descriptionHtml:
Senior Manager SEO – SaaS Product SEO / AEO ( 7+ years )

Experience: 7 + years

Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Employment Type: Full-time

No of Positions: 2–3

Notice Period: Immediate Joiners Preferred

Industry: SaaS / AI Platforms / IT Services

Educational Qualification: Bachelor degree in Engineering from Tier I/Master’s degree from Tier I


Role Overview: Lead product SEO and AEO/GEO for a SaaS platform, partnering with Product Marketing on new product launches and brand messaging, and driving measurable growth across Google SERPs and AI answer engines through scalable content, technical SEO, and entity-first optimization.


Success Metrics (example targets): Define and report weekly on non-brand organic signups/MQLs, top-3 ranking gains, organic share-of-voice in priority clusters (including launch pages), AI-citation wins (AI Overviews/ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity), and brand lift signals such as branded search growth and direct traffic contribution.


Role Summary & Requirements:

You will own SEO growth for a SaaS product—improving existing rankings, expanding high-intent keyword coverage, and increasing visibility in AI answer engines via structured content, entities, and technical excellence.

Must-have experience:

  • Scaled already-ranking pages (e.g., top 10 → top 3) through on-page, internal linking, and intent/CTR improvements
  • Built and executed keyword cluster expansion around existing winners to grow qualified organic pipeline
  • Delivered measurable visibility in AI answer engines (AI Overviews/ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity) using structured data + entity optimization
  • Operated in a product + engineering environment (shipping technical SEO fixes, templates, and scalable content systems)

Core competencies:

  • Intent mapping across SaaS funnels (product-led, solutions, comparisons) with clear page-to-keyword ownership
  • Internal linking and information architecture to strengthen topical clusters
  • Content briefs, editorial QA, and experimentation (titles/FAQs/modules) to lift rankings and conversions

Technical SEO (hands-on or strongly partnered with engineering):

  • Crawl/index control, templates, and site architecture improvements that move rankings
  • JavaScript rendering and performance (Core Web Vitals) diagnostics and fixes with dev teams
  • Schema/structured data strategy (e.g., Product, FAQ, HowTo, Breadcrumb, Organization) to improve SERP + AI readability

AEO / GEO (AI Search Optimization):

  • Create citation-ready pages: clear entities, definitions, comparisons, and evidence blocks; consistent product terminology across the site
  • Implement/validate structured data and on-page modules that increase extraction (FAQs, steps, specs, pricing/plan tables where applicable)
  • Measure AI visibility via tracked prompts/queries, citation mentions, and overlap with priority clusters—then iterate content and schema
  • Interview expectation: bring one example of an AEO/SEO experiment or case study (problem → approach → results → learnings)

Brand & product launch:

  • Partner with Product Marketing on new product launches: positioning, naming/terminology, launch pages, and message consistency across web properties
  • Build launch-ready content systems (landing page templates, comparison pages, FAQs, proof blocks) that support both brand trust and conversion
  • Nice-to-have: experience running or collaborating on paid acquisition (search/social) and using insights to improve organic + AI visibility

Leadership & operating model:

  • Lead analysts and content partners with clear priorities, QA standards, and weekly reporting
  • Run a monthly roadmap across content, technical SEO, and AEO/GEO initiatives with measurable outcomes
  • Coach execution and ensure repeatable systems (briefs, templates, internal linking rules, dashboards)


Responsibilities:

  • Own the SEO + AEO/GEO roadmap for SaaS acquisition across Google and AI answer engines
  • Improve performance of existing ranking pages (top 10 → top 3 where strategic) and expand clusters to grow qualified pipeline
  • Partner with engineering on technical SEO (crawl/index, templates, CWV, JS rendering, structured data)
  • Build topical authority via digital PR/backlinks and partner content where it supports product growth
  • Support new product launches with SEO/AEO-ready messaging and launch pages; align with Product Marketing on brand narrative and terminology
  • Set measurement: dashboards for rankings, non-brand traffic, conversions, and AI citations; communicate insights to stakeholders
  • Manage team execution, quality, and delivery cadence in an AI-first search environment

Qualifications:

  • 7+ years in SEO for SaaS or product-led businesses; experience owning outcomes (traffic, pipeline, signups)
  • Demonstrated wins improving already-ranking pages and expanding keyword clusters with clear measurement
  • Hands-on with Google Search Console, GA4, and at least one major SEO suite (Ahrefs/SEMrush) plus crawler tools (e.g., Screaming Frog)
  • Strong technical SEO fundamentals and ability to partner with developers to ship fixes
  • Practical exposure to AEO/GEO with a repeatable approach to improving AI citations/mentions
  • Nice-to-have experience with paid search / performance marketing collaboration (ads copy, landing page testing, incrementality) to accelerate launches
  • People leadership: hiring/coaching, prioritization, and stakeholder communication

title: Senior Product Manager

As the subject matter expert on Connect CDC, you will guide product development and identify growth opportunities. You will ensure the product continues to meet the evolving demands of our 12,000 customers worldwide. This is an individual contributor role with significant impact and visibility.What you will do:Define and own the Connect CDC roadmap, prioritizing capabilities that address customer needs and drive competitive differentiation in data integration and Change Data Capture.Conduct ongoing research with customers, prospects, and analysts to surface unmet needs and inform product direction.Author clear business requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria; maintain a well-prioritized backlog in close collaboration with engineering.Partner with Engineering, UX, Support, and GTM teams throughout the product lifecycle to ensure on-time, high-quality delivery.Monitor the CDC and data integration landscape and develop a working understanding of technical concepts such as connectors, pipelines, replication, and cloud/hybrid deployment.Align product direction with internal stakeholders across Product, Sales, and Customer Success; serve as the go-to resource on Connect CDC capabilities and strategy.What we are looking for:Education: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience. descriptionHtml:
Application and Interview Impersonation Notice:  Impersonating another individual when applying for employment, and/or participating in an interview process to assist another individual in obtaining employment, with Precisely Software Incorporated (“Precisely”) is unlawful.  If Precisely identifies such fraudulent conduct, then as applicable and to the extent permitted by law, the application will be rejected, an offer (if made) will be rescinded, or the employment will be terminated, and legal action may be taken against the impersonators.

 

Precisely is the leader in data integrity. We empower businesses to make more confident decisions based on trusted data through a unique combination of software, data enrichment products and strategic services. What does this mean to you? For starters, it means joining a company focused on delivering outstanding innovation and support that helps customers increase revenue, lower costs and reduce risk. In fact, Precisely powers better decisions for more than 12,000 global organizations, including 95 of the Fortune 100. Precisely's 2500 employees are unified by four company core values that are central to who we are and how we operate: Openness, Determination, Individuality, and Collaboration. We are committed to career development for our employees and offer opportunities for growth, learning and building community. With a "work from anywhere" culture, we celebrate diversity in a distributed environment with a presence in 30 countries as well as 20 offices in over 5 continents. Learn more about why it's an exciting time to join Precisely!

Overview:

Join our Data Integration team and take ownership of the Connect CDC product line. You will translate market trends and customer insights into a clear product roadmap. You will work closely with engineering, design, and go-to-market teams to deliver high-quality solutions. As the subject matter expert on Connect CDC, you will guide product development and identify growth opportunities. You will ensure the product continues to meet the evolving demands of our 12,000 customers worldwide. This is an individual contributor role with significant impact and visibility.

What you will do:

  • Define and own the Connect CDC roadmap, prioritizing capabilities that address customer needs and drive competitive differentiation in data integration and Change Data Capture.
  • Conduct ongoing research with customers, prospects, and analysts to surface unmet needs and inform product direction.
  • Author clear business requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria; maintain a well-prioritized backlog in close collaboration with engineering.
  • Partner with Engineering, UX, Support, and GTM teams throughout the product lifecycle to ensure on-time, high-quality delivery.
  • Monitor the CDC and data integration landscape and develop a working understanding of technical concepts such as connectors, pipelines, replication, and cloud/hybrid deployment.
  • Align product direction with internal stakeholders across Product, Sales, and Customer Success; serve as the go-to resource on Connect CDC capabilities and strategy.

What we are looking for:

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience. A background in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related field is helpful but not required.
  • Experience: 5–7 years of product management experience building SaaS platforms, shared services, or internal-facing capabilities used by multiple product teams.
  • Demonstrated ability to design and deliver reusable platform components—such as entitlement management, usage metering, tenant administration, and API-driven services—that support cross-team development at scale.
  • Proven ability to define platform standards, manage complex stakeholder groups, and drive execution in an Agile environment with multiple dependent teams.
  • Hands-on experience with Agile development practices and product tools such as Aha! or similar roadmapping and backlog management platforms.
  • Familiarity with data integration concepts such as CDC, ETL/ELT, connectors, or real-time data pipelines.
  • Travel is required: No.
  • Bonus points for: experience with hybrid cloud deployments (particularly AWS and MongoDB), hands-on familiarity with Kubernetes or API integration frameworks, exposure to CDC technologies, background in data quality or data governance, or familiarity with SQL, databases, or streaming platforms such as Kafka.

The personal data that you provide as a part of this job application will be handled in accordance with relevant laws. For more information about how Precisely handles the personal data of job applicants, please see the Precisely Candidate Privacy Notice

Application and Interview Impersonation Notice:  Impersonating another individual when applying for employment, and/or participating in an interview process to assist another individual in obtaining employment, with Precisely Software Incorporated (“Precisely”) is unlawful.  If Precisely identifies such fraudulent conduct, then as applicable and to the extent permitted by law, the application will be rejected, an offer (if made) will be rescinded, or the employment will be terminated, and legal action may be taken against the impersonators.

Precisely is the leader in data integrity. We empower businesses to make more confident decisions based on trusted data through a unique combination of software, data enrichment products and strategic services. What does this mean to you? For starters, it means joining a company focused on delivering outstanding innovation and support that helps customers increase revenue, lower costs and reduce risk. In fact, Precisely powers better decisions for more than 12,000 global organizations, including 95 of the Fortune 100. Precisely's 2500 employees are unified by four company core values that are central to who we are and how we operate: Openness, Determination, Individuality, and Collaboration. We are committed to career development for our employees and offer opportunities for growth, learning and building community. With a "work from anywhere" culture, we celebrate diversity in a distributed environment with a presence in 30 countries as well as 20 offices in over 5 continents. Learn more about why it's an exciting time to join Precisely!

Precisely is an AI-first organization. All employees are expected to demonstrate proficiency in applying AI tools to accelerate their work, improve output quality, and eliminate low-value tasks. Candidates should be comfortable using generative AI tools (e.g., Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT) in their day-to-day workflows, able to evaluate AI-generated outputs critically, and open to continuously adopting new AI capabilities as they emerge.

 

Overview:

Join our Product Management team and become a driving force behind the Master Data Management Product (MDM) group. In this pivotal role, you'll delve into market trends across our existing and target customer segments, transforming insights into actionable business requirements, functional use cases, and compelling product solutions involving AI. Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams, you'll emerge as the subject matter expert on MDM, guiding product development and supporting sales with your deep product knowledge and market insights. Your expertise will identify growth opportunities, inform strategy, and ensure our products continue to meet the evolving needs of our market.

What you will do:

  • Manage Product Requirements: Gather and prioritize product needs from customers, sales, support, and other teams. Create clear documentation (MRDs and PRDs), and work with Engineering to build the roadmaps.
  • Develop Business Plans: Collaborate and contribute to create long-term business plans for selected market segments. Track performance and update stakeholders regularly.
  • Build Business Cases: Support product decisions, use of AI, and partnerships with solid business models and justifications.
  • Communicate Effectively: Share updates clearly through documents, emails, and presentations. Ensure stakeholders understand market trends and product direction.
  • Provide Leadership: Be the voice of the customer and influence the direction of the product.
  • Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with Marketing, Engineering, Strategic Planning, and other product teams to make informed decisions and expand product influence.
  • Track Success Metrics: Monitor and report on key performance indicators to ensure goals are being met.

What we are looking for:

  • Experience: 8+ years of product management experience building data products, shared services, or internal-facing capabilities used by multiple product teams.
  • Education: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience. Background in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or related fields is helpful but not required.
  • Product Management Expertise: Demonstrated ability to design and deliver solutions specifically in product information management or other data domains—such as material master, customer master, reference data, etc.
  • Experience with a broad spectrum of data management practices, including data quality, data integration, data governance, and metadata management.
  • Experience with AI: Demonstrated expertise in justifying and embedding AI in products.
  • Hybrid Cloud Expertise: Experience with hybrid cloud deployments and SaaS solutions, particularly in AWS.
  • Strategic & Execution Skills: Proven ability to define platform standards, manage complex stakeholder groups, and drive execution in an Agile environment with multiple dependent teams and a high-volume feature backlog.
  • Conceptual Technical Proficiency: Comfortable partnering with engineering on high-level architectural decisions involving APIs, integrations, platform services, and hybrid deployment models.
  • Tools & Methodology Experience: Hands-on experience with Agile development practices and product tools such as Aha!. Demonstrated ability to influence without authority and lead cross-functional initiatives across product lines.
  • Enthusiasm to work in a fast-paced, demanding business environment while collaborating effectively with cross-functional groups, management, sales and customers.
  • Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage high volumes of work
  • Excellent analytical, interpersonal, managerial, and organizational skills

The personal data that you provide as a part of this job application will be handled in accordance with relevant laws. For more information about how Precisely handles the personal data of job applicants, please see the Precisely Candidate Privacy Notice

title: Senior Product Manager - Production Scheduling, R&D
description: Transforming the Future of Enterprise PlanningAt o9, our mission is to be the Most Value-Creating Platform for enterprises by transforming decision-making through our AI-first approach. By integrating siloed planning capabilities and capturing millions—even billions—in value leakage, we help businesses plan smarter and faster.This not only enhances operational efficiency but also reduces waste, leading to better outcomes for both businesses and the planet. Global leaders like Google, PepsiCo, Walmart, T-Mobile, AB InBev, and Starbucks trust o9 to optimize their supply chains.Role: Senior Product Manager - Production Scheduling, R&DLocation: Bangalore, HybridAbout the role...As a Senior Product Manager – Production Scheduling Solver, you’ll play a key role in shaping and evolving o9’s production scheduling capabilities. You’ll act as the bridge between customers, engineering, UX, QA, and other stakeholders, ensuring our solutions solve real business challenges in the most efficient way.What you’ll do for us…Understand the market trends, competitive landscape carefully and with the in-depth understanding of our existing product, chalk out the product vision and prioritize the new features and requirementsAct as a domain expert and advocate/implements the best practices with the development teamUnderstand the individual customer requirements carefully and create the Functional specifications, Use cases, mock-ups and other documents required for the development team to get going. Explain functional requirements to the development teamMake sure that the solution that is designed and developed effectively meets the business objectives of the end usersValidate/test the newly developed features and their impact on existing features. Demonstrate these new features to key stakeholders and get their feedbackWork with UX team to create a pleasant user experienceAct as the functional ‘Go-to’ person for the QA teamAct as the hub of the stakeholders for the application, interfacing with the customers,sales, consulting and development teamsProvide product training to internal and external departmentsAct as an SME and reviews the training material and product documentationHelp the sales and pre-sales teams to support RFPs, RFQs, ongoing implementations andcustomer demos (preparation / delivery)As SME, act as the first respondent for any functional queries / issues from internal /external teamsDesign and evaluate production scheduling algorithms, understand their usage, trade-offs, and performance implications to ensure robust scheduling solutions.Leverage deep hands-on experience in production scheduling to propose, improve, and validate innovative scheduling techniquesWhat you’ll have...Experience: 8+ years as a product manager5+ years of hardcore production scheduling experience. Must not only have implemented scheduling solutions but also have a strong understanding of scheduling algorithms, their applications, and techniques.Experience working within Cloud, SaaS, any enterprise supply planning solutions will be an added advantageEducation: Full Time Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in Engineering or master’s in business administrationSkills: Excellent understanding of the Supply chain planning and scheduling domainExcellent English language skills, both verbal and written.Characteristics:A good leader who can communicate the project plans and status of projects effectivelyA self-motivated person who can work calmly under pressure and meet deadlinesExcellent problem-solving, organizational, analytical and influencing skills, with proven ability to take initiativesWhat we’ll do for you:Flat organization: With a very strong entrepreneurial culture (and no corporate politics).Great people and unlimited fun at work.Possibility to really make a difference in a scale-up environment.Support network: Work with a team you can learn from every day.Diversity: We pride ourselves on our international working environment.DavOs Insight (Turning VUCA into value with Neuro-Symbolic AI): https://l1nk.dev/ngQoeWork-Life Balance: https://youtu.be/IHSZeUPATBA?feature=sharedFeel part of A team: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6B2lEJl2oIHow the process works...Setup & Create your profile in Workday to track the status - Link to apply. If already done, kindly ignore!Respond with your interest to us.We’ll contact you either via video call or phone call - whatever you prefer, with the further schedule status.Online Assessment - Domain specificDuring the interview phase, you will meet with the technical panel for 60 minutes. We will contact you after the interview to let you know if we’d like to progress your application.There will be 2 rounds of technical discussion followed by a Managerial round.We will let you know if you’re the successful candidate.Good luck!
descriptionHtml:
Transforming the Future of Enterprise Planning


At o9, our mission is to be the Most Value-Creating Platform for enterprises by transforming decision-making through our AI-first approach. By integrating siloed planning capabilities and capturing millions—even billions—in value leakage, we help businesses plan smarter and faster.


This not only enhances operational efficiency but also reduces waste, leading to better outcomes for both businesses and the planet. Global leaders like Google, PepsiCo, Walmart, T-Mobile, AB InBev, and Starbucks trust o9 to optimize their supply chains.


Role: Senior Product Manager - Production Scheduling, R&D

Location: Bangalore, Hybrid


About the role...

As a Senior Product Manager – Production Scheduling Solver, you’ll play a key role in shaping and evolving o9’s production scheduling capabilities. You’ll act as the bridge between customers, engineering, UX, QA, and other stakeholders, ensuring our solutions solve real business challenges in the most efficient way.


What you’ll do for us…

  • Understand the market trends, competitive landscape carefully and with the in-depth understanding of our existing product, chalk out the product vision and prioritize the new features and requirements
  • Act as a domain expert and advocate/implements the best practices with the development team
  • Understand the individual customer requirements carefully and create the Functional specifications, Use cases, mock-ups and other documents required for the development team to get going. Explain functional requirements to the development team
  • Make sure that the solution that is designed and developed effectively meets the business objectives of the end users
  • Validate/test the newly developed features and their impact on existing features. Demonstrate these new features to key stakeholders and get their feedback
  • Work with UX team to create a pleasant user experience
  • Act as the functional ‘Go-to’ person for the QA team
  • Act as the hub of the stakeholders for the application, interfacing with the customers,sales, consulting and development teams
  • Provide product training to internal and external departments
  • Act as an SME and reviews the training material and product documentation
  • Help the sales and pre-sales teams to support RFPs, RFQs, ongoing implementations andcustomer demos (preparation / delivery)
  • As SME, act as the first respondent for any functional queries / issues from internal /external teams
  • Design and evaluate production scheduling algorithms, understand their usage, trade-offs, and performance implications to ensure robust scheduling solutions.
  • Leverage deep hands-on experience in production scheduling to propose, improve, and validate innovative scheduling techniques


What you’ll have...

  • Experience: 8+ years as a product manager
  • 5+ years of hardcore production scheduling experience. Must not only have implemented scheduling solutions but also have a strong understanding of scheduling algorithms, their applications, and techniques.
  • Experience working within Cloud, SaaS, any enterprise supply planning solutions will be an added advantage
  • Education: Full Time Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree in Engineering or master’s in business administration
  • Skills: Excellent understanding of the Supply chain planning and scheduling domain
  • Excellent English language skills, both verbal and written.
  • Characteristics:
  • A good leader who can communicate the project plans and status of projects effectively
  • A self-motivated person who can work calmly under pressure and meet deadlines
  • Excellent problem-solving, organizational, analytical and influencing skills, with proven ability to take initiatives


What we’ll do for you:

  • Flat organization: With a very strong entrepreneurial culture (and no corporate politics).
  • Great people and unlimited fun at work.
  • Possibility to really make a difference in a scale-up environment.
  • Support network: Work with a team you can learn from every day.
  • Diversity: We pride ourselves on our international working environment.
  • DavOs Insight (Turning VUCA into value with Neuro-Symbolic AI): https://l1nk.dev/ngQoe
  • Work-Life Balance: https://youtu.be/IHSZeUPATBA?feature=shared
  • Feel part of A team: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O6B2lEJl2oI


How the process works...

  • Setup & Create your profile in Workday to track the status - Link to apply. If already done, kindly ignore!
  • Respond with your interest to us.
  • We’ll contact you either via video call or phone call - whatever you prefer, with the further schedule status.
  • Online Assessment - Domain specific
  • During the interview phase, you will meet with the technical panel for 60 minutes. We will contact you after the interview to let you know if we’d like to progress your application.
  • There will be 2 rounds of technical discussion followed by a Managerial round.
  • We will let you know if you’re the successful candidate.

Good luck!

descriptionHtml:
About Nanonets

Nanonets has a vision to help computers see the world starting with reading and understanding documents.Machine Learning (ML) is no longer a futuristic concept—it's a present-day powerhouse transforming the business landscape. Nanonets is at the forefront of this transformation, offering innovative ML solutions designed to make document related processes faster than ever before.

From automating data extraction processes to enhancing reconciliation, our solutions are designed to revolutionize workflows, optimize operations, and unlock untapped potential for our clients. Our client footprint spans across brands such as Toyota, Boston Scientific, Bill.com and Entergy to name a few enabling businesses across a myriad of industries to unlock the potential of their visual and textual data

We recently announced a series B round of $29 million in funding by Accel and are backed by the likes of existing investors including Elevation Capital & YCombinator. This infusion of capital underscores our commitment to driving innovation and expanding our reach in delivering cutting-edge AI solutions to businesses worldwide.


Read about us : Forbes | TechCrunch


We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity.


About the role

As we continue to scale, we are looking to hire a dynamic and results-driven Senior Product Manager to join our growing team at Nanonets. You will be playing a key role in building solutions and driving forward the product roadmap. You will be deeply engaged in understanding our customers, prioritizing pain points to solve, converting them into detailed stories, and seeing them through to releases.


What we’re looking for

  • 5+ years of experience, including experience working on user-facing SAAS products.
  • At least 2+ years of hands-on experience in software engineering(must have)
  • Impact focused and a consistent history of delivering measurable results for both users and the business.
  • Ability to think big and small to build incremental features and prototypes in service of a larger vision. You are as comfortable working in paper-prototypes as you are building out scalable features for demanding enterprise clients and know when to do which.
  • Comfort and skill at presenting to and gaining traction with audiences of all sizes — from executive meetings with our CEO and customer syncs to company all-hands and external events You are a self-motivated team player with the ability to work in fast-paced environments with minimal oversight.
  • Product sense and craftsmanship. You will own important product interactions with every Nanonets customer and should show the attention to detail this responsibility deserves.
  • You listen well. You build consensus by default, but can drive hard decisions when needed. You push the pace. You take blame and pass on praise. People love working with you.
  • B.E/B.Tech or a business graduate from a Tier 1 school.


What you’ll do

  • Develop the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Nanonets customers to fully deploy Nanonets to serve their partners and customers.
  • Product Strategy: Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and execute the product roadmap, considering market trends, competitive landscape, and customer feedback.
  • Requirements Gathering: Conduct thorough market research and engage with stakeholders to identify user needs, pain points, and opportunities for product improvement.
  • New Feature Development: Evaluate feature requests and prioritize them based on business value, technical feasibility, and customer impact.
  • Product Development: Work closely with engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle, providing clear requirements, feedback, and guidance to ensure timely delivery of high-quality features.
  • Product Launch: Coordinate product launches, including developing go-to-market strategies, creating marketing collateral, and conducting training sessions for internal teams and clients.
  • Performance Analysis: Define key performance metrics and track product performance post-launch, leveraging data analytics to identify areas for optimization and iteration.

Partnering with leading financial institutions, we deploy intelligent software and AI to enhance advisor productivity and deepen client relationships - enabling firms to deliver personalized advice at unprecedented scale.After building one of the industry’s leading Digital Wealth platforms, we’ve evolved. Today, Tandems is an AI-first company, building intelligent tools that help advisors run better meetings, anticipate client needs, and make more informed decisions. descriptionHtml:
Come thrive at Tandems! At Tandems, we’re reimagining the future of financial advice. We empower financial advisors to deliver smarter, more human guidance by combining data, empathy, and artificial intelligence. Partnering with leading financial institutions, we deploy intelligent software and AI to enhance advisor productivity and deepen client relationships - enabling firms to deliver personalized advice at unprecedented scale.


After building one of the industry’s leading Digital Wealth platforms, we’ve evolved. Today, Tandems is an AI-first company, building intelligent tools that help advisors run better meetings, anticipate client needs, and make more informed decisions. Our solutions are trusted by some of the world’s largest and most innovative financial institutions, including Wells Fargo, New York Life, Scotiabank, and Citizens.


About the Team and Opportunity

As a Senior Product Manager at Tandems, you will help lead Tandems’ next chapter by embedding AI thinking and capabilities across our suite of products and shaping how financial advisors work in the age of intelligence.


This is a high-impact, cross-functional role at the heart of Tandems’ transformation. You’ll work closely with Engineering, Data Science, Design, Research, and Business stakeholders to define and deliver products that blend machine learning, behavioral insights, and human-centered design.


You’ll drive innovation not only within a specific product area but also across the company, influencing how we conceptualize and integrate AI across our ecosystem, from advisor tools to client engagement and portfolio management experiences.


Why Work for Us

  • We are 100+ employees strong and growing. Our world-class team is supported by an industry-savvy board and an executive team of diverse background and experience across financial services and technology.
  • We offer competitive benefits that include Flexible PTO, Wellness benefits, Mobile/Internet subsidy, Employee Recognition Programs, and more!
  • We are a remote-first company! We have regional hubs nationwide, with presence in 4 Countries: United States, Canada, India, and Singapore.
  • We embrace a culture that honors and celebrates diversity of backgrounds, approaches, and experiences.
  • We are guided by our core values: Customer Delight, Make It Happen, Think Big, and We Over Me. Read more about our core values and how we live them every day on our website here.


How You’ll Make an Impact

  • Shape the AI vision for advisor success: Lead the roadmap for products that use intelligence and automation to transform the financial advice industry.
  • Infuse AI across Tandems’ ecosystem: Partner with other Product, Engineering, and Data Science leaders to define how AI enhances user experiences and outcomes across all existing and future products.
  • Translate intelligence into action: Work with data scientists to turn model outputs into intuitive product experiences that create measurable real-world value.
  • Champion responsible AI: Define and advocate for principles around transparency, fairness, and explainability in every product we build.
  • Experiment and iterate: Use data and user feedback to drive hypotheses, run experiments, and evolve features that deliver measurable advisor and business impact.
  • Collaborate broadly: Partner across design, marketing, and customer success to ensure product experiences are cohesive, valuable, and aligned with Tandems’ mission.


Ideal Person for this Role

  • 5–10+ years in a product-focused role, ideally building and shipping enterprise, B2B, or platform products at scale.
  • Systems thinker with the ability to understand how product decisions influence data flows, adjacent teams, and end-to-end user journeys.
  • AI-curious and fluent, comfortable discussing models, ML-driven UX patterns, and data-powered product experiences (no coding required).
  • Human-centered mindset grounded in empathy, user research, and designing technology that enhances—not replaces—human expertise.
  • Strong analytical and research skills, leveraging both qualitative and quantitative insights to prioritize effectively and measure impact.
  • Execution excellence, with a track record of balancing strategy and detail, making tradeoffs, and delivering in fast-moving environments.
  • Technical curiosity, able to dive into data models, APIs, and system architecture to understand how intelligence becomes value.
  • Data-driven and outcome-oriented, using metrics, experimentation, and evidence to drive decisions.
  • Collaborative leadership, with extensive experience influencing and partnering across engineering, design, data, sales, marketing, and operations.
  • Exceptional communication skills and the ability to work effectively with remote or distributed teams; FinTech or startup experience is a plus.


Perks and Benefits

  • Tax-friendly Compensation
  • Liberal Leave Policy
  • Medical cover for the family, including parents
  • Quarterly Wellness Benefit
  • Mobile/Internet subsidy (for smooth WFH experience)


Tandems is backed by premier venture capital firms, including Bain Capital Ventures, General Atlantic, Nyca Partners, and Union Square Ventures as well as leading financial institutions including Wells Fargo, UBS, Santander, New York Life, and Comerica. We've raised over $100 million to support our growth as a leading technology provider to financial institutions.


© Nvest. All rights reserved, Tandems is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. We encourage people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives to apply.


San Francisco Applicants: Tandems will consider applicants with arrest and conviction records (criminal histories) in a manner consistent with the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance.

title: Senior Product Manager- Remote
description: Who are are:Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized products for millions of global customers. Our Mass Customization Platform (MCP) consists of modular, multi-tenant services. Our businesses include a dozen brands such as Vistaprint, National Pen and Box Up. These businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do things like introduce new products, reach customers and track orders. This kind of innovation keeps customers coming back. Just last year, Cimpress generated $3.2B in revenue through customized print products, signage, apparel, packaging and more.Our Team:The Access team plays a critical role in securing and enabling the Mass Customization Platform (MCP), the technology backbone that powers Cimpress businesses such as Vistaprint, National Pen, and others.Access is responsible for onboarding businesses, managing users, and safeguarding the platform through robust Identity, Authentication, Tenancy, Account Management, Authorization, and Risk Intelligence and Compliance solutions. Our systems ensure that every person, service, and application that intends and is permitted to connect with MCP can do so securely and operate with the right level of trust and control.As a Senior Product Manager in the Access team, you will own the product direction and execution for critical functional areas within our Identity and Access Management (IAM) and extended portfolio. You will serve as the bridge between high-level platform strategy and on-the-ground execution, delivering secure, scalable, and developer-centric solutions. You will take ownership of complex problem spaces such as identity, authentication, authorization, tenancy, and risk intelligence and drive them from vague requirements to successful global adoption. You will act as a trusted partner to engineering and security architects, and business teams making data-informed trade-offs between security rigor, compliance, and user experience. In this role, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy, and influence stakeholders across Cimpress businesses. You will ensure that our authentication and authorization services evolve to support emerging technologies, including AI agents and third-party ecosystem integrations.What You Will DoDefine and execute the quarterly and annual product roadmap for significant components of the Access products. Champion a secure, scalable, and API-first foundation for the products you manage.Collaborate across the organization with business units, platform teams, and stakeholders to ensure Access solutions meet real-world needs while balancing security, usability, and scalability.Collaborate with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions and negotiate technical tradeoffs.Measure and improve outcomes using adoption metrics, platform performance data, and customer feedback to continuously refine product features and operational processes.Manage expectations with stakeholders across Cimpress businesses, communicating progress, risks, and changes effectively.What Will Make You A Great Candidate9-14 years of professional experience, including 5+ years as a Product Manager, ideally working on complex, high-quality B2B or B2C web-based products, preferably in the SaaS space.Deep domain expertise and proven track record in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Authentication protocols (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), Granular Application Access Control, Security and Compliance, Role-based Access Management, Policy-based Access Management, or Platform tenancy.You prioritize understanding user and business needs and translate insights into intuitive, secure, and reliable product experiences for both internal and external users.Strong sense of UI/UX principles, development frameworks, functional design, and familiarity with tools and platforms used for product development. You have good tech grasp and are able to collaborate meaningfully with business users, engineers, architects, and security teams.Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous customer and business needs into clear product requirements and milestones.Leverage quantitative and qualitative insights to inform decisions, measure outcomes, and continuously improve product quality and usability.Exceptional skills in partnership, communication, presentation, and influencing across diverse teams and stakeholders. You can build consensus and drive decisions among the product cross functional team.Exceptional technical acumen and ability to collaborate meaningfully with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions.Proven track record of managing a portfolio of technical, API-first platform products through the full lifecycle, from ideation to deprecation.Some Nice To HavesBachelor’s degree in Computer/IT/Electronics Engineering and/or previous s/w development experience is a huge advantageMBA from a Tier-1/Tier-2 Business School.Deep working knowledge of one or more of the these areas: SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect, Social SignOn, SSO, LDAP, Okta, Auth0, integrating with API-first productsAbility to create concept wireframes.Exposure to Agentic AI productsWhat’s In It For You (besides the best in-class rewards):An Opportunity to be a part of the global market leader in the mass customization industry.A chance to GROW professionally building technology solutions for a largely unorganized market.A system that EMPOWERS each member with a high degree of trust, freedom and autonomy.A GLOBAL team that has some of the best minds in product, data and engineering.A REMOTE-FIRST operating model and impeccable culture.Why you will love working hereBeing at Cimpress means that you don’t see work as just a building, a desk or a manufacturing floor. You see it as a chance to take a step forward in your career journey – and your life. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed. Through innovation, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We embrace the chance to operate outside of our comfort zone to discover what we’re capable of. Some might call that a challenge; we just call it another great day at work.We will help you define a clear perception of how to make the most of what you do best.Equal Opportunity Employer:Cimpress is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.We're Remote-FirstIn 2020, Cimpress adopted a Remote-First operating model and culture. We heard from our team members that having the freedom, autonomy, and trust in each other to work from home and the ability to operate when they are most productive, empowers them to be their best.Please visit our company website to learn more about Cimpress and how we empower people to make an impression through mass customization by delivering uniquely personalized products in a convenient and affordable way. You'll find detailed insights into our entrepreneurial approach, global operations, and commitment to innovation at cimpress.com.
descriptionHtml:
Who are are:

Cimpress Technology develops cutting-edge, best-in-world software that our mass customization businesses use to create personalized products for millions of global customers. Our Mass Customization Platform (MCP) consists of modular, multi-tenant services. Our businesses include a dozen brands such as Vistaprint, National Pen and Box Up. These businesses can choose the solutions that work for them, or assemble any custom combination they need. This makes it easier and faster to do things like introduce new products, reach customers and track orders. This kind of innovation keeps customers coming back. Just last year, Cimpress generated $3.2B in revenue through customized print products, signage, apparel, packaging and more.


Our Team:

The Access team plays a critical role in securing and enabling the Mass Customization Platform (MCP), the technology backbone that powers Cimpress businesses such as Vistaprint, National Pen, and others.

Access is responsible for onboarding businesses, managing users, and safeguarding the platform through robust Identity, Authentication, Tenancy, Account Management, Authorization, and Risk Intelligence and Compliance solutions. Our systems ensure that every person, service, and application that intends and is permitted to connect with MCP can do so securely and operate with the right level of trust and control.


As a Senior Product Manager in the Access team, you will own the product direction and execution for critical functional areas within our Identity and Access Management (IAM) and extended portfolio. You will serve as the bridge between high-level platform strategy and on-the-ground execution, delivering secure, scalable, and developer-centric solutions.

You will take ownership of complex problem spaces such as identity, authentication, authorization, tenancy, and risk intelligence and drive them from vague requirements to successful global adoption. You will act as a trusted partner to engineering and security architects, and business teams making data-informed trade-offs between security rigor, compliance, and user experience.

In this role, you will operate with a high degree of autonomy, and influence stakeholders across Cimpress businesses. You will ensure that our authentication and authorization services evolve to support emerging technologies, including AI agents and third-party ecosystem integrations.


What You Will Do

  • Define and execute the quarterly and annual product roadmap for significant components of the Access products. Translate high-level strategic goals into detailed, actionable plans.
  • Lead deep-dive discovery with Cimpress business units to identify unarticulated needs. Use data, market research, and competitive analysis to validate hypotheses and prioritize high-impact features.
  • Lead continuous market research, competitive analysis, and engagement with partner teams and business units across the company to identify and prioritize high-impact opportunities, define business cases, and lead 'build vs. buy' evaluations for critical Access related product technologies.
  • Collaborate with engineering to translate the large-scale initiatives into a clear, prioritized backlog of measurable outcomes.
  • Comply with the UX principles of the Access products, ensuring our APIs, SDKs, and tools are intuitive, well-documented, and easy to integrate. Champion a secure, scalable, and API-first foundation for the products you manage.
  • Collaborate across the organization with business units, platform teams, and stakeholders to ensure Access solutions meet real-world needs while balancing security, usability, and scalability.
  • Collaborate with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions and negotiate technical tradeoffs.
  • Measure and improve outcomes using adoption metrics, platform performance data, and customer feedback to continuously refine product features and operational processes.
  • Manage expectations with stakeholders across Cimpress businesses, communicating progress, risks, and changes effectively.


What Will Make You A Great Candidate

  • 9-14 years of professional experience, including 5+ years as a Product Manager, ideally working on complex, high-quality B2B or B2C web-based products, preferably in the SaaS space.
  • Deep domain expertise and proven track record in Identity & Access Management (IAM), Authentication protocols (OAuth, OIDC, SAML), Granular Application Access Control, Security and Compliance, Role-based Access Management, Policy-based Access Management, or Platform tenancy.
  • You prioritize understanding user and business needs and translate insights into intuitive, secure, and reliable product experiences for both internal and external users.
  • Strong sense of UI/UX principles, development frameworks, functional design, and familiarity with tools and platforms used for product development. You have good tech grasp and are able to collaborate meaningfully with business users, engineers, architects, and security teams.
  • Demonstrated ability to translate complex, ambiguous customer and business needs into clear product requirements and milestones.
  • Leverage quantitative and qualitative insights to inform decisions, measure outcomes, and continuously improve product quality and usability.
  • Exceptional skills in partnership, communication, presentation, and influencing across diverse teams and stakeholders. You can build consensus and drive decisions among the product cross functional team.
  • Exceptional technical acumen and ability to collaborate meaningfully with engineers and architects on system design, API contracts, and architectural decisions.
  • Proven track record of managing a portfolio of technical, API-first platform products through the full lifecycle, from ideation to deprecation.


Some Nice To Haves

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer/IT/Electronics Engineering and/or previous s/w development experience is a huge advantage
  • MBA from a Tier-1/Tier-2 Business School.
  • Deep working knowledge of one or more of the these areas: SAML, OAuth, OpenID Connect, Social SignOn, SSO, LDAP, Okta, Auth0, integrating with API-first products
  • Ability to create concept wireframes.
  • Exposure to Agentic AI products


What’s In It For You (besides the best in-class rewards):

  • An Opportunity to be a part of the global market leader in the mass customization industry.
  • A chance to GROW professionally building technology solutions for a largely unorganized market.
  • A system that EMPOWERS each member with a high degree of trust, freedom and autonomy.
  • A GLOBAL team that has some of the best minds in product, data and engineering.
  • A REMOTE-FIRST operating model and impeccable culture.


Why you will love working here

Being at Cimpress means that you don’t see work as just a building, a desk or a manufacturing floor. You see it as a chance to take a step forward in your career journey – and your life. We strive to give you everything you need to learn, grow, and succeed. Through innovation, collaboration, and perpetual exposure to what’s next, we’re always pushing boundaries and broadening our horizons. We embrace the chance to operate outside of our comfort zone to discover what we’re capable of. Some might call that a challenge; we just call it another great day at work.

We will help you define a clear perception of how to make the most of what you do best.


Equal Opportunity Employer:

Cimpress is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, national or ethnic origin, nationality, age, religion, citizenship, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender presentation, legal or preferred name, marital status, pregnancy, family structure, veteran status or any other basis protected by human rights laws or regulations. This list is not exhaustive and, in fact, in many cases, we strive to do more than the law requires.


We're Remote-First

In 2020, Cimpress adopted a Remote-First operating model and culture. We heard from our team members that having the freedom, autonomy, and trust in each other to work from home and the ability to operate when they are most productive, empowers them to be their best.

Please visit our company website to learn more about Cimpress and how we empower people to make an impression through mass customization by delivering uniquely personalized products in a convenient and affordable way. You'll find detailed insights into our entrepreneurial approach, global operations, and commitment to innovation at cimpress.com.
