descriptionHtml:
About Learneo
Learneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal.

Role Overview
Now we’re building a full AI-powered creation platform that supports them from the first spark of an idea to a finished, shareable piece of work.

The creation suite is a key pillar of this evolution, the space where users can transform their words into visually compelling assets: presentations, campaigns, PDFs, social posts, and more.

We’re looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead this effort and shape the future of how people create with QuillBot.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the evolution of the creation suite from MVP to a flagship QuillBot product—driving the roadmap, success metrics, and user experience.
  • Own the end-to-end user journey for visual creation—from ideation to layout to export.
  • Partner with engineers, designers, marketing, brand, SEO and researchers to turn text and ideas into adaptive, multimodal outputs.
  • Define and validate workflows, templates, and design systems that make non-designers feel like creators.
  • Collaborate closely with the Writing and Chat product teams to ensure seamless handoffs between idea, draft, and design.
  • Use data, research, and product intuition to balance user delight, technical feasibility, and business impact.
  • Lead a cross-functional pod toward measurable outcomes—traffic, engagement, retention, and satisfaction.

Qualification 

  • 6+ years of product management experience, with at least 2 years building/growing creation or design-centric products.
  • A track record of taking consumer-facing tools from 0→1 or 1→N, ideally with products in the creative or productivity space.
  • Experience in AI-assisted or automation-heavy workflows—text-to-image, auto-layout, or generative creation—is highly desirable.
  • Deep understanding of UX for creative tools and empathy for non-technical users.
  • Strong design sensibility—you understand layout, visual hierarchy, and what makes creation feel effortless.
  • Data-driven mindset; comfort working with analytics to inform decisions and measure success.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills across design, engineering, marketing, and leadership.

What You Can Expect to Do in Your 180 Days

First 30 Days: Learn & Align

  • Deep-dive into QuillBot’s creation platform vision, user personas, and current MVP.
  • Understand the existing creation suite experience, performance metrics, and user pain points.
  • Conduct a competitive benchmarking.
  • Build strong partnerships with Design, Engineering, and AI/UX Research leads.
  • Align on near-term success metrics and team priorities.

30-90 Days: Define & Prioritize

  • Craft a clear roadmap for post-MVP development—defining which workflows, templates, and features matter most.
  • Lead early experiments in user experience, template expansion, and AI-assisted creation.
  • Establish analytics and feedback loops for measuring product success.
  • Partner with marketing and growth to position the creation suite within QuillBot’s ecosystem.

90–180 Days—Execute & Scale

  • Launch new workflows or features that significantly improve user creation speed and output quality.
  • Define and validate the long-term strategy for multimodal, brand-aware creation.
  • Drive engagement growth and user retention through data-backed iteration.
  • Build the foundation for QuillBot’s primary visual creation surface.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

  • Own one of the most impactful growth and experimentation surfaces at QuillBot.
  • Shape how millions of users discover and first experience QuillBot.
  • Work at the intersection of AI, growth, and product systems.
  • Collaborate with a team that values speed, learning, and thoughtful product decisions.
  • Be a key driver of QuillBot’s transition from individual tools to a cohesive creation platform.

Benefits & Perks

  • Competitive salary and annual bonus
  • Medical coverage
  • Life and accidental insurance
  • Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
  • Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
  • Maternity & parental leave
  • Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
  • On-site & remote company events throughout the year
  • Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
  • Employee referral program
  • Premium access to QuillBot

*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process.

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!

This role is eligible for hire in India.

We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits and other types of compensation.

#Learneo

Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

We are a virtual-first company and have employees dispersed throughout the United States, Canada, India, Israel, Germany, and the Netherlands. We have a market-based pay structure that varies by location. The base pay for this position is dependent on multiple factors, including candidate experience and expertise, and may vary from the amounts listed. You may also be eligible to participate in our bonus program and may be offered benefits and other types of compensation.

#QuillBot

Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)
We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

descriptionHtml:
About Wati

Started as a WhatsApp team inbox in 2020, Wati has evolved into a full revenue orchestration system that goes beyond a single platform. We empower businesses that sell, support, and grow through conversations by observing customer intent in real-time, deciding the next best revenue action, and executing it seamlessly across marketing, sales, and support—all within WhatsApp and connected messaging channels.


Our Platform & AI Capabilities

Wati is designed for scalability and intelligence. Our AI-native platform simplifies complex customer communication operations through a unified inbox, a robust multi-channel messaging infrastructure, and no-code automation. At the heart of our solution is Astra, our intelligent AI layer, which helps you create AI Agents for all customer interactions and all your messaging platforms. By integrating AI agents into the ecosystem, we enable businesses of all sizes to deliver measurable ROI and build deeper customer relationships.


Our Backing & Partnerships

Trusted by over 16,000 customers across 190+ countries, Wati is proudly backed by world-class investors including Tiger Global, Sequoia Capital, DST Global, and Shopify. As a Premium-tier Partner of Meta and Google, we maintain the highest standards of platform excellence and integration.


About the Role

Wati is growing rapidly and we are looking to hire a Senior Product Manager to help scale our product offerings and work with our product and engineering teams to develop and execute our shared product vision. We are looking for extremely entrepreneurial PMs who value moving quickly.


If you have demonstrated experience building APIs & MCPs, understand developer communities, have empathy for both consumers and businesses and want to unlock the potential for messaging to serve millions of customers, we would be excited to hear from you.

This will be an opportunity for you to build experiences that thousands of small businesses use on a daily basis, and to be a key part of this high growth journey.


What you’ll do:

- Own the product strategy and roadmap for building native integrations, strong APIs and an Agent friendly platform

- Identify high-impact integration and ecosystem opportunities by analyzing developer needs, Agent behaviours, partner platforms, and competitive landscapes

- Work closely with engineering to define APIs, SDKs, auth, and extensibility primitives that scale and are easy to adopt

- Build a product-led partnerships strategy that turns integrations into a repeatable demand and revenue channel

- Lead 0→1 and early-scale experiments for new integrations, marketplaces and communities; measuring adoption, activation, and revenue impact

- Collaborate with sales, partnership and marketing teams to launch, position, and grow integrations and drive adoption amongst developer communities

- Synthesize learnings and present clear recommendations to leadership


Requirements

  • Experience as a Senior Product Manager at a scale or growth-stage company, ideally on developer, platform, or ecosystem products
  • Strong technical product judgment; comfortable working with AI platforms, APIs, MCPs, integrations, LLM tooling, and developer and agentic workflows
  • Track record of launching new platforms and iterating based on real usage and data
  • Ability to operate with ambiguity while building systems that scale
  • Data-driven mindset with clear communication and stakeholder management skills


Nice to have:

  • Experience at a startup or high-growth scaleup
  • Coding or SQL experience — you don't need to ship code, but you can read it and get your own answers from data
  • Familiarity with the messaging, CPaaS, or WhatsApp ecosystem
  • Bachelor's in Computer Science or a related technical field

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Role OverviewAs the Senior Product manager for Kernel, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our product offerings within the cryptocurrency and decentralized finance space. We are seeking a visionary leader who possesses a deep understanding of blockchain technology, cryptocurrencies, and the emerging trends in decentralized finance.Key ResponsibilitiesContribute in the development and execution of our product strategy for cryptocurrency and DeFi products.Conduct market research and analysis to identify opportunities and drive product innovation.Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, design, and marketing to bring new products to market.Define product requirements, specifications, and roadmaps based on market needs and business objectives.Stay abreast of the latest developments in the cryptocurrency and DeFi space, and integrate relevant technologies and trends into our product offerings.Drive user adoption and engagement through effective product positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategies.Monitor product performance and user feedback, and iterate on product features and functionalities to continuously improve the user experience.QualificationsAround 6+ years of overall product management experience. Prior exposure to cryptocurrency or blockchain is a plus, not mandatory.Understanding of blockchain technology, cryptocurrencies, and decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols.Strong analytical skills and ability to translate market insights into actionable product strategies.Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.Entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for driving innovation and delivering results in a fast-paced startup environment.
descriptionHtml:
Role Overview

As the Senior Product manager for Kernel, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our product offerings within the cryptocurrency and decentralized finance space. We are seeking a visionary leader who possesses a deep understanding of blockchain technology, cryptocurrencies, and the emerging trends in decentralized finance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Contribute in the development and execution of our product strategy for cryptocurrency and DeFi products.
  • Conduct market research and analysis to identify opportunities and drive product innovation.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, design, and marketing to bring new products to market.
  • Define product requirements, specifications, and roadmaps based on market needs and business objectives.
  • Stay abreast of the latest developments in the cryptocurrency and DeFi space, and integrate relevant technologies and trends into our product offerings.
  • Drive user adoption and engagement through effective product positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategies.
  • Monitor product performance and user feedback, and iterate on product features and functionalities to continuously improve the user experience.

Qualifications

  • Around 6+ years of overall product management experience. Prior exposure to cryptocurrency or blockchain is a plus, not mandatory.
  • Understanding of blockchain technology, cryptocurrencies, and decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols.
  • Strong analytical skills and ability to translate market insights into actionable product strategies.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
  • Entrepreneurial mindset with a passion for driving innovation and delivering results in a fast-paced startup environment.

title: Staff Product Manager - Social Planner, Ad Manager, Blogs
description: About UsHighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.Our peopleWith over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.Our impactEvery month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. We do this by building innovative products & features that solve real-world problems for agencies and allow them to consolidate their offering to their clients in a single platform packaged under their white-labled brand.The marketing products OS team focuses exclusively on products that can demonstrate lead generation and drive up engagement, adoption in target segments. This team handles multiple product areas including Blogging, Social Planner, Email Marketing, Chat widget, Affiliate manager, Chat Widget, Template Library, Brand Boards etc.HighLevel is an exciting place to work as it gives adrenaline to build and help our user base.  We take care of our team so our team can take care of our users It’s never somebody else’s job - Take ownership as a company owner We are passionately focussed on adding value for our users We deliver fast using lean principles (Agile framework). We go to market in weeks instead of quarters A good innovative idea always gets tested and we deliver based on feedbacksWe embrace that improvement is constant and iterative. Constant Learning Growth graph - You will learn how to scale B2B SaaS Startup and build relevant, impactful products for customers We are do-ers and go-getters to achieve team adoptions.The roleWe’re looking for a Staff Product Manager to own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for three core products: Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager.You’ll be responsible for turning a strong product vision into reality, driving meaningful business and customer impact, and leveling up the product team around you. You’ll directly mentor and grow a team of APMs into solid PM2-level product managers while partnering closely with Design, Engineering, Data, Marketing, and GTM.This is a highly strategic, high-impact role for someone who can think in systems, ship fast with quality, and raise the bar for product management across the organization.What You’ll Own Product Strategy & Vision Own the end-to-end product strategy and roadmap for Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager. Translate company and product vision into clear north-star metrics , long-term bets, and a sequenced 12–18 month roadmap.Identify and validate the most impactful problems to solve for our core customers (agencies, marketers, SMBs, etc.). Ad Manager – Smart, Data-Driven, AI-First System Evolve Ad Manager into a smarter, less API-dependent, more data-reliant, AI-driven system aligned with the long-term product vision.Partner with Data and Engineering to: Design systems that use first-party and performance data to optimize campaigns, budgets, and targeting. Reduce fragility and over-reliance on external APIs by building intelligent abstractions and fallbacks . Integrate AI-driven recommendations , automation, and guardrails to improve campaign outcomes and reduce manual work. Define and track success metrics such as campaign performance, time-to-launch, and user adoption of smart features. Social Planner – UI/UX Excellence & Competitive Parity Own Social Planner as a core flagship experience that can compete with other tools Lead major improvements across: UI & workflows (scheduling, approvals, calendar, collaboration, automations, comment management). Statistics & reporting (post performance, account-level insights, content analytics). Controls for owners (permissions, approvals, governance, workspace controls). Partner with Design to deliver a clean, intuitive, and scalable UX , and ensure high-quality execution with Engineering. Blogs – WordPress-Level Experience with AI & Automation Make the HighLevel blogging experience seamless and familiar , comparable to platforms like WordPress, Wix, and Blogger. Define and drive a roadmap that: Modernizes the editor experience into a full-featured, reliable, WYSIWYG-style (or block-based) editor. Introduces powerful AI-assisted workflows (content creation, outlines, rewrites, image suggestions, internal linking). Improves SEO tooling (on-page recommendations, metadata support, schema basics, publishing workflows). Ensure blogs integrate smoothly into the broader HighLevel ecosystem (funnels, websites, SEO, content strategy). Execution, Delivery & Cross-Functional Leadership Turn strategy into clear, prioritized roadmaps , well-defined problem statements, and detailed specs where needed. Run discovery (customer interviews, data analysis, experiments) to validate problems and solutions. Partner with Engineering to plan releases, manage scope, and ensure predictable and high-quality delivery . Work closely with Marketing, Sales, Support, and Customer Success to: Shape positioning, messaging, and GTM plans . Enable internal teams with the right documentation and training. Incorporate market/field feedback quickly into the roadmap. Mentorship & Team Development Directly mentor and grow two APMs into strong PM2s , with clear expectations, coaching, and feedback. Build a culture of data-informed, customer-obsessed, outcome-driven product management. Lead by example on craft : PRDs, problem framing, stakeholder management, and prioritization. Evangelize best practices around experimentation, discovery, and continuous improvement.What You’ll Bring 9-12+ years of experience in Product Management, with at least 3+ years at Senior/Staff/Principal level owning complex product areas. Proven track record of shipping impactful products in B2B SaaS, ideally in: Marketing automation Social media management Advertising platforms Content / CMS / blogging tools Strong technical aptitude : Understanding of APIs, data flows, and system design at a conceptual level. Experience working with data/ML/AI-driven products is a strong plus. Deep experience with discovery and experimentation : Defining metrics, running A/B tests, analyzing usage data, and validating hypotheses. Demonstrated ability to rebuild or significantly revamp complex UX flows (dashboards, editors, planners, calendars, etc.). Experience mentoring and developing PMs/APMs , with examples of helping them level up. Excellent written and verbal communication skills; able to influence senior stakeholders and drive alignment. Comfortable operating in fast-paced, ambiguous, high-growth environments with multiple priorities.What Success Looks Like (6–12 Months)Within your first year, you will have: Delivered a clear, aligned 12–18 month roadmap for Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager. Shipped high-impact improvements that: Make Ad Manager meaningfully smarter, more reliable, and more data/AI-powered. Upgrade Social Planner UX and capabilities to be competitive with leading social tools. Transform Blogs into a modern, powerful editor with AI and SEO capabilities that users love. Improved key metrics (ad performance, usage, retention, satisfaction) across your product areas. Developed your APMs, with clear progress toward PM2-level ownership and performance . Earned a reputation as a go-to strategic leader who can connect dots across teams and drive big, meaningful outcomes.Equal Employment Opportunity InformationThe company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
descriptionHtml:
About Us

HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.

To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.

Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.

Our people

With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.

Our impact

Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.

Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts

About The Team

The Product team is responsible for driving lead generation and management of leads. We do this by building innovative products & features that solve real-world problems for agencies and allow them to consolidate their offering to their clients in a single platform packaged under their white-labled brand.

The marketing products OS team focuses exclusively on products that can demonstrate lead generation and drive up engagement, adoption in target segments. This team handles multiple product areas including Blogging, Social Planner, Email Marketing, Chat widget, Affiliate manager, Chat Widget, Template Library, Brand Boards etc.

HighLevel is an exciting place to work as it gives adrenaline to build and help our user base.

  • We take care of our team so our team can take care of our users
  • It’s never somebody else’s job - Take ownership as a company owner
  • We are passionately focussed on adding value for our users
  • We deliver fast using lean principles (Agile framework). We go to market in weeks instead of quarters
  • A good innovative idea always gets tested and we deliver based on feedbacksWe embrace that improvement is constant and iterative.
  • Constant Learning Growth graph - You will learn how to scale B2B SaaS Startup and build relevant, impactful products for customers
  • We are do-ers and go-getters to achieve team adoptions.

The role

We’re looking for a Staff Product Manager to own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for three core products: Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager.

You’ll be responsible for turning a strong product vision into reality, driving meaningful business and customer impact, and leveling up the product team around you. You’ll directly mentor and grow a team of APMs into solid PM2-level product managers while partnering closely with Design, Engineering, Data, Marketing, and GTM.

This is a highly strategic, high-impact role for someone who can think in systems, ship fast with quality, and raise the bar for product management across the organization.

What You’ll Own

  • Product Strategy & Vision
  • Own the end-to-end product strategy and roadmap for Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager.
  • Translate company and product vision into clear north-star metrics , long-term bets, and a sequenced 12–18 month roadmap.

Identify and validate the most impactful problems to solve for our core customers (agencies, marketers, SMBs, etc.).

  • Ad Manager – Smart, Data-Driven, AI-First System
  • Evolve Ad Manager into a smarter, less API-dependent, more data-reliant, AI-driven system aligned with the long-term product vision.

Partner with Data and Engineering to:

  • Design systems that use first-party and performance data to optimize campaigns, budgets, and targeting.
  • Reduce fragility and over-reliance on external APIs by building intelligent abstractions and fallbacks .
  • Integrate AI-driven recommendations , automation, and guardrails to improve campaign outcomes and reduce manual work.
  • Define and track success metrics such as campaign performance, time-to-launch, and user adoption of smart features.
  • Social Planner – UI/UX Excellence & Competitive Parity
  • Own Social Planner as a core flagship experience that can compete with other tools
  • Lead major improvements across:
  • UI & workflows (scheduling, approvals, calendar, collaboration, automations, comment management).
  • Statistics & reporting (post performance, account-level insights, content analytics).
  • Controls for owners (permissions, approvals, governance, workspace controls).
  • Partner with Design to deliver a clean, intuitive, and scalable UX , and ensure high-quality execution with Engineering.
  • Blogs – WordPress-Level Experience with AI & Automation
  • Make the HighLevel blogging experience seamless and familiar , comparable to platforms like WordPress, Wix, and Blogger.
  • Define and drive a roadmap that:
  • Modernizes the editor experience into a full-featured, reliable, WYSIWYG-style (or block-based) editor.
  • Introduces powerful AI-assisted workflows (content creation, outlines, rewrites, image suggestions, internal linking).
  • Improves SEO tooling (on-page recommendations, metadata support, schema basics, publishing workflows).
  • Ensure blogs integrate smoothly into the broader HighLevel ecosystem (funnels, websites, SEO, content strategy).
  • Execution, Delivery & Cross-Functional Leadership
  • Turn strategy into clear, prioritized roadmaps , well-defined problem statements, and detailed specs where needed.
  • Run discovery (customer interviews, data analysis, experiments) to validate problems and solutions.
  • Partner with Engineering to plan releases, manage scope, and ensure predictable and high-quality delivery .
  • Work closely with Marketing, Sales, Support, and Customer Success to:
  • Shape positioning, messaging, and GTM plans .
  • Enable internal teams with the right documentation and training.
  • Incorporate market/field feedback quickly into the roadmap.
  • Mentorship & Team Development
  • Directly mentor and grow two APMs into strong PM2s , with clear expectations, coaching, and feedback.
  • Build a culture of data-informed, customer-obsessed, outcome-driven product management.
  • Lead by example on craft : PRDs, problem framing, stakeholder management, and prioritization.
  • Evangelize best practices around experimentation, discovery, and continuous improvement.

What You’ll Bring

  • 9-12+ years of experience in Product Management, with at least 3+ years at Senior/Staff/Principal level owning complex product areas.
  • Proven track record of shipping impactful products in B2B SaaS, ideally in:
  • Marketing automation
  • Social media management
  • Advertising platforms
  • Content / CMS / blogging tools
  • Strong technical aptitude :
  • Understanding of APIs, data flows, and system design at a conceptual level.
  • Experience working with data/ML/AI-driven products is a strong plus.
  • Deep experience with discovery and experimentation : Defining metrics, running A/B tests, analyzing usage data, and validating hypotheses.
  • Demonstrated ability to rebuild or significantly revamp complex UX flows (dashboards, editors, planners, calendars, etc.).
  • Experience mentoring and developing PMs/APMs , with examples of helping them level up.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills; able to influence senior stakeholders and drive alignment.
  • Comfortable operating in fast-paced, ambiguous, high-growth environments with multiple priorities.

What Success Looks Like (6–12 Months)

Within your first year, you will have:

  • Delivered a clear, aligned 12–18 month roadmap for Social Planner, Blogs, and Ad Manager.
  • Shipped high-impact improvements that:
  • Make Ad Manager meaningfully smarter, more reliable, and more data/AI-powered.
  • Upgrade Social Planner UX and capabilities to be competitive with leading social tools.
  • Transform Blogs into a modern, powerful editor with AI and SEO capabilities that users love.
  • Improved key metrics (ad performance, usage, retention, satisfaction) across your product areas.
  • Developed your APMs, with clear progress toward PM2-level ownership and performance .
  • Earned a reputation as a go-to strategic leader who can connect dots across teams and drive big, meaningful outcomes.

Equal Employment Opportunity Information

The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Manager, Search Product Analytics
description: At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.Role: Senior Manager, Data Science & Analytics – Search Product Analytics LeadOverviewWe are seeking a Senior Manager / Lead Data Scientist to own the Search Product Analytics function at eBay. In this role, you will partner closely with the Search product and engineering teams, using eBay’s vast data ecosystem to uncover insights, influence the Search roadmap, and drive customer-centric innovation across our marketplace.You will manage a team of data scientists, champion experimentation excellence, and develop analytics strategy for one of eBay’s most critical user experiences — Search. This role combines hands-on analytics depth, strategic impact, and leadership responsibility.Key Responsibilities Strategic Analytics LeadershipServe as the analytics leader for eBay’s Search product, setting the vision for data-driven decision-making and influencing long-term strategy.Partner with Product, Engineering, and Business collaborators to define success metrics, establish analytical frameworks, and guide prioritization.Lead the end-to-end analytics roadmap for Search — from opportunity sizing and hypothesis generation to measurement, experimentation, and impact evaluation. Experimentation & MeasurementDevelop, implement, and interpret A/B tests and causal inference studies to evaluate new Search experiences, ranking models, and personalization algorithms.Translate complex analytical outcomes into clear, actionable insights for non-technical audiences.Promote standard processes in experimental design, metric definition, and statistical rigor across teams. Team Leadership & DevelopmentLead, mentor, and grow a high-performing analytics team; develop career paths and champion a culture of curiosity, rigor, and impact.Partner with recruiting and analytics leadership to attract and retain top analytical talent.Provide coaching and technical mentorship to ensure consistent analytic quality and scalability across projects. Cross-Functional CollaborationAct as the analytics link between Search, Personalization, Ads, and Buyer Experience teams to ensure well-rounded understanding of user intent and behavior.Drive alignment across product areas, ensuring consistent measurement standards and shared findings.Advocate for data democratization by building intuitive reporting, self-serve tools, and metric documentation. Operational & Execution ExcellenceEvaluate feature and experiment performance, ensuring decisions are rooted in robust data analysis.Enable rapid insight generation through automation and scalable experimentation pipelines.Continuously improve analytical workflows and frameworks for speed and reliability.Required Skills & Experience8+ years of experience in product analytics, data science, or experimentation roles; 2+ years leading analytics teams.Strong command of A/B testing design, causal inference, and experimentation measurement.Deep expertise in SQL, Python/R, and data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau).Strong foundation in statistics, machine learning fundamentals, and data-driven hypothesis testing.Proven record of delivering insights that drive measurable business and product impact.Able to translate data into actionable narratives and influence senior executives.Known to work in highly matrixed, cross-functional environments.Preferred QualificationsAdvanced degree or equivalent experience in a quantitative field (Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, etc.).Experience in Search, Ranking, or Personalization analytics within e-commerce or digital marketplaces.Familiarity with big data platforms, experimentation frameworks, and LLM/AI toolsExperience building or influencing data and metric infrastructure for large-scale experimentation systems.Strong presentation and partner management skills, with ability to influence at VP+ levels.What You’ll GainOpportunity to shape the future of eBay’s Search experience, a core pillar of buyer engagement.High visibility and ownership over analytics strategy for one of eBay’s most data-rich domains.An environment that encourages innovation, curiosity, and technical excellence.Please see the Talent Privacy Notice for information regarding how eBay handles your personal data collected when you use the eBay Careers website or apply for a job with eBay.eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.The eBay Jobs website uses cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. Visit our Privacy Center for more information.
descriptionHtml:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.

Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.

Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.

Role: Senior Manager, Data Science & Analytics – Search Product Analytics Lead

Overview

We are seeking a Senior Manager / Lead Data Scientist to own the Search Product Analytics function at eBay. In this role, you will partner closely with the Search product and engineering teams, using eBay’s vast data ecosystem to uncover insights, influence the Search roadmap, and drive customer-centric innovation across our marketplace.

You will manage a team of data scientists, champion experimentation excellence, and develop analytics strategy for one of eBay’s most critical user experiences — Search. This role combines hands-on analytics depth, strategic impact, and leadership responsibility.

Key Responsibilities

  • Strategic Analytics Leadership
  • Serve as the analytics leader for eBay’s Search product, setting the vision for data-driven decision-making and influencing long-term strategy.
  • Partner with Product, Engineering, and Business collaborators to define success metrics, establish analytical frameworks, and guide prioritization.
  • Lead the end-to-end analytics roadmap for Search — from opportunity sizing and hypothesis generation to measurement, experimentation, and impact evaluation.
  • Experimentation & Measurement
  • Develop, implement, and interpret A/B tests and causal inference studies to evaluate new Search experiences, ranking models, and personalization algorithms.
  • Translate complex analytical outcomes into clear, actionable insights for non-technical audiences.
  • Promote standard processes in experimental design, metric definition, and statistical rigor across teams.
  • Team Leadership & Development
  • Lead, mentor, and grow a high-performing analytics team; develop career paths and champion a culture of curiosity, rigor, and impact.
  • Partner with recruiting and analytics leadership to attract and retain top analytical talent.
  • Provide coaching and technical mentorship to ensure consistent analytic quality and scalability across projects.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration
  • Act as the analytics link between Search, Personalization, Ads, and Buyer Experience teams to ensure well-rounded understanding of user intent and behavior.
  • Drive alignment across product areas, ensuring consistent measurement standards and shared findings.
  • Advocate for data democratization by building intuitive reporting, self-serve tools, and metric documentation.
  • Operational & Execution Excellence
  • Evaluate feature and experiment performance, ensuring decisions are rooted in robust data analysis.
  • Enable rapid insight generation through automation and scalable experimentation pipelines.
  • Continuously improve analytical workflows and frameworks for speed and reliability.


Required Skills & Experience

  • 8+ years of experience in product analytics, data science, or experimentation roles; 2+ years leading analytics teams.
  • Strong command of A/B testing design, causal inference, and experimentation measurement.
  • Deep expertise in SQL, Python/R, and data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau).
  • Strong foundation in statistics, machine learning fundamentals, and data-driven hypothesis testing.
  • Proven record of delivering insights that drive measurable business and product impact.
  • Able to translate data into actionable narratives and influence senior executives.
  • Known to work in highly matrixed, cross-functional environments.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Advanced degree or equivalent experience in a quantitative field (Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, etc.).
  • Experience in Search, Ranking, or Personalization analytics within e-commerce or digital marketplaces.
  • Familiarity with big data platforms, experimentation frameworks, and LLM/AI tools
  • Experience building or influencing data and metric infrastructure for large-scale experimentation systems.
  • Strong presentation and partner management skills, with ability to influence at VP+ levels.


What You’ll Gain

  • Opportunity to shape the future of eBay’s Search experience, a core pillar of buyer engagement.
  • High visibility and ownership over analytics strategy for one of eBay’s most data-rich domains.
  • An environment that encourages innovation, curiosity, and technical excellence.


Please see the Talent Privacy Notice for information regarding how eBay handles your personal data collected when you use the eBay Careers website or apply for a job with eBay.

eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.

The eBay Jobs website uses cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse the site, you agree to our use of cookies. Visit our Privacy Center for more information.

descriptionHtml:
Arkose Labs is on a mission to create an online environment where all consumers are protected from spam and abuse. As a Fast Company 2025 Best Workplace for Innovators, we provide a proactive fraud deterrence platform, Arkose Titan, designed to neutralize modern attacks powered by Agentic AI and LLMs. By combining proprietary intelligence with dynamic friction, we undermine attacker ROI to protect global giants like Microsoft, Meta, and Roblox. Headquartered in San Mateo, CA, we maintain a global presence across APAC, Central and South America, and EMEA.

Role Overview

We're looking for a Product Manager to own and drive automation within our detection and mitigation systems. This role sits at the intersection of product strategy, data analysis, and machine learning operations, you'll be responsible for identifying opportunities to automate threat response, validating those opportunities through rigorous data analysis, and working closely with data scientists and engineers to bring automation solutions to production.

This is a hands-on, technically-oriented PM role. You'll spend significant time in the data yourself—validating hypotheses, understanding detection performance, and ensuring that automation investments deliver measurable impact against evolving attack patterns.

Key Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Roadmap

  • Identify and prioritize automation opportunities based on attack trends, operational efficiency gains, and customer impact
  • Define success metrics and track performance of automation features post-launch
  • Build business cases grounded in quantitative evidence—expected detection improvements, false positive trade-offs, operational cost reductions

Data Analysis & Opportunity Validation

  • Conduct hands-on analysis of detection data, traffic patterns, and attack signatures to identify automation opportunities
  • Work with telemetry and truth data to validate that proposed automation will perform as expected before engineering investment

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Partner with ML researchers & analysts to translate detection research into productized automation capabilities
  • Work with engineering teams to scope, prioritize, and deliver automation features on schedule
  • Collaborate with SOC and customer-facing teams to understand operational pain points and incorporate feedback into product direction

Stakeholder Engagement

  • Communicate automation strategy and progress to executives, customers, and internal stakeholders
  • Gather customer feedback and market insights to inform product direction
  • Support sales and solutions teams with technical context on automation capabilities

Must Have

  • 5+ years of product management experience in security, fraud prevention, or data-intensive B2B SaaS products
  • Strong data analysis capability you're comfortable writing SQL, analyzing large datasets, and drawing actionable conclusions from ambiguous data
  • Experience working with ML/data science teams: you understand how models are trained, validated, and deployed, and can translate research into product requirements
  • Hands-On Technical Drive:You are able to leverage LLMs and tools like Claude Code for analysis, prototyping and understanding code, and take ownership of complex problems, driving solutions forward with resourcefulness and urgency
  • Technical fluency: able to engage deeply with engineers on system design, trade-offs, and feasibility
  • Proven ability to define and ship products from concept through launch, with measurable business impact
  • Excellent communication skills: able to articulate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences and build alignment across stakeholders

Nice to Have

  • Experience in bot detection, fraud prevention, or cybersecurity domains
  • Familiarity with detection systems, classification pipelines, or anomaly detection
  • Proficiency with data tools beyond SQL (Python, notebooks, visualization tools)
  • Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) and tools like JIRA/Confluence
  • Advanced degree in a technical or business field

This is a hybrid role based in Pune, India, with an expectation of three days per week in office. Relocation assistance is provided for candidates outside of Pune.

Why Arkose Labs?

At Arkose Labs, our technology-driven approach enables us to make a substantial impact in the industry, supported by a robust customer base consisting of global enterprise giants such as Microsoft, Roblox, and more. We’re not just a company; we’re a collaborative ecosystem where you will actively partner with these influential brands, tackling the most demanding technical challenges to safeguard hundreds of millions of users across the globe.

Why do top tech professionals choose Arkose Labs?

Cutting-Edge Technology: Our high-efficacy solutions, backed by solid warranties, attract leading, global enterprise clients.Innovation and Excellence: We foster a culture that emphasizes technological innovation and the pursuit of excellence, ensuring a balanced and thriving work environment.Experienced Leadership: Guided by seasoned executives with deep tech expertise and a history of successful growth and equity events.Ideal Size: We’re structured to be agile and adaptable, large enough to provide stability, yet small enough to value your voice and ideas.

Join us in shaping the future of technology. At Arkose Labs, you’re not just an employee; you’re part of a visionary team driving global change

The most recognizable brands in the world select Arkose Labs, including Roblox, Microsoft, Adobe, Expedia, Snap and Meta.

We value your unique contributions, perspectives, and experiences. Be part of a diverse and high-performing environment that prioritizes collaboration, excellence, and inclusion. We hire the best, focus on their professional development, and offer support for continuing education.

We Value

  • People: first and foremost they are our most valuable resource. Our people are independent thinkers who make data driven decisions and take ownership and accountability in all the things they do.
  • Team Work. We demonstrate respect, trust, integrity, and communicate openly with a positive can do attitude and constructively challenge one another
  • Customer Focus. We empathize with our customers and obsess about solving their problems
  • Execution with precision, professionalism and urgency
  • Security. It’s the lens through which we implement our processes, procedures, and programs

Benefits

  • Competitive salary + Equity
  • Beautiful office space with many perks
  • Robust benefits package
  • Provident Fund
  • Accident Insurance
  • Flexible working hours and work from home days to support personal well-being and mental health

Arkose Labs is an Equal Opportunity Employer that makes employment decisions without regard to race, color, religious creed, national origin, ancestry, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, mental or physical disability, medical condition, military or veteran status, citizenship, marital status, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. In addition, Arkose Labs will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities.

descriptionHtml:
Who We Are

Motive empowers the people who run physical operations with tools to make their work safer, more productive, and more profitable. For the first time ever, safety, operations and finance teams can manage their drivers, vehicles, equipment, and fleet related spend in a single system. Combined with industry leading AI, the Motive platform gives you complete visibility and control, and significantly reduces manual workloads by automating and simplifying tasks.

Motive serves nearly 100,000 customers – from Fortune 500 enterprises to small businesses – across a wide range of industries, including transportation and logistics, construction, energy, field service, manufacturing, agriculture, food and beverage, retail, and the public sector.

Visit gomotive.com to learn more.

About The Role

As a Senior Product Manager, Financial Products, you will be responsible for driving and executing the strategic market expansion of Motive’s Spend Management offering. This high-impact role provides an opportunity to own a major, revenue-driving pillar of the business - identifying and launching our offering into high-growth, untapped sectors and/or new international markets. You will be the primary product voice for this domain, working closely with Sales, Growth and Marketing teams and having a direct line of sight into the roadmap of the entire financial products organization.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-moving environment, can quickly develop expert domain knowledge in new geographies and highly complex or regulated sectors and convert that knowledge into building tangible revenue generating products.

What You’ll Do

  • Define the long-term product vision and MVP for Motive Card entry into new sectors and markets.
  • Conduct deep customer research, identify Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs), and outline the feature set necessary for successful adoption.
  • Develop the product strategy & roadmap by partnering closely with key stakeholders (including other PMs, PMMs, AEs, SEs) to introduce Motive Card into new sectors and/or international geographies, prioritizing based on market opportunity and operational readiness.
  • Align priorities & Execute effectively on this roadmap by collaborating cross-functionally with Sales, Finance, Legal, Risk, Compliance, and Engineering teams.
  • Develop and articulate clear metrics, business requirements, goals, and user stories.
  • Own and maintain detailed product documentation, including Product Requirement Documents (PRDs), wireframes, and process flows, ensuring seamless execution by engineering teams.
  • Serve as the primary product Subject Matter Expert (SME) for expansion initiatives, supporting Sales and Business Development with deep product knowledge and strategic positioning.

What We’re Looking For

  • 7+ years of experience in Product Management (B2B/Fintech experience is a plus)
  • Direct experience launching products into new, complex, or regulated sectors, or significant experience with 0-to-1 product development
  • Experience launching products in new geographies is a plus.
  • High customer empathy with a proven ability to conduct customer discovery, market analysis, and translate findings into clear, impactful product strategy.
  • Be data-driven, with a track record of using data and metrics to back up assumptions, build business cases, and make product decisions.
  • Sufficient technical knowledge to understand platform capabilities, dependencies, and to earn the respect and trust of software engineers.
  • Exceptional interpersonal skills and a high EQ, enabling to work effectively with remote teams and manage stakeholders across all levels of seniority.
  • Experience in an agile product development environment is essential.

Creating a diverse and inclusive workplace is one of Motive's core values. We are an equal opportunity employer and welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives.

Please review our Candidate Privacy Notice here.

UK Candidate Privacy Notice here.

The applicant must be authorized to receive and access those commodities and technologies controlled under U.S. Export Administration Regulations. It is Motive's policy to require that employees be authorized to receive access to Motive products and technology.

title: Sr. Product Manager - Template Library, Brand Board & Countdown Timer
description: About UsHighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.Our peopleWith over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.Our impactEvery month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog PostsAbout The TeamThe Product team is responsible for driving lead generation and management of leads. We do this by building innovative products & features that solve real-world problems for agencies and allow them to consolidate their offering to their clients in a single platform packaged under their white-labled brand.The marketing products OS team focuses exclusively on products that can demonstrate lead generation and drive up engagement, adoption in target segments. This team handles multiple product areas including Dashboard and Reporting, Blogging, Social Planner, Email Marketing, Chat widget, Affiliate manager, Chat Widget, Template Library, Brand Boards etc.HighLevel is an exciting place to work as it gives adrenaline to build and help our user base. We take care of our team so our team can take care of our users It’s never somebody else’s job - Take ownership as a company owner We are passionately focussed on adding value for our users We deliver fast using lean principles (Agile framework). We go to market in weeks instead of quarters A good innovative idea always gets tested and we deliver based on feedbacks We embrace that improvement is constant and iterative. Constant Learning Growth graph - You will learn how to scale B2B SaaS Startup and build relevant, impactful products for customers We are do-ers and go-getters to achieve team adoptions. Role OverviewWe're looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead the strategy and execution for our Template Library, Brand Board, and Countdown Timer initiatives.You'll own the end-to-end product vision for how agency owners, subaccount users, marketers, and end customers create on-brand assets at scale, codify their business DNA, and drive urgency-based conversions inside HighLevel — turning fragmented design assets, brand identity, and conversion tooling into a unified, AI-powered creation ecosystem that spans every product surface.This is a highly strategic, cross-cutting role with outsized impact on time-to-value, agency monetization, brand consistency, and conversion lift — transforming three foundational platform capabilities into category-defining products that can replace best-in-class point solutions (Canva-class design surfaces, Google Pomelli-style brand systems, Deadline Funnel, and Elfsight).What You'll Own 1. Strategy & VisionOwn the north-star vision and roadmap for:Template Library (multi-product, marketplace-ready, AI-enhanced creation engine) Brand Board (centralized business DNA that flows into every HighLevel product) Countdown Timer (multi-surface, dynamically synced, conversion-focused engagement primitive) Translate company strategy into clear, measurable product outcomes (e.g., template adoption, agency template revenue, brand-board attach rate, cross-product asset reuse, timer-driven conversion lift, replacement of third-party tools like Deadline Funnel and Elfsight).Map and deeply understand the ecosystem: agency owners, agency designers/marketers, subaccount users, end customers, template creators (monetizing agencies), and enterprise stakeholders standardizing brand at scale. Product Specific Responsibilities  Template Library: Own the end-to-end vision for a multi-product template catalog spanning 12+ HighLevel surfaces, from niche-based discovery and agency template monetization to a Canva-class, AI-native creation engine — enabling users to generate, clone, and customize on-brand assets from a prompt or URL. Brand Board: Build and maintain HighLevel's single source of truth for business identity — capturing logos, colors, typography, and voice — and ensure those values propagate automatically across every product surface, with a roadmap toward AI-powered brand extraction, smart drift detection, and generative brand asset creation. Countdown Timer: Own a multi-surface conversion primitive that embeds across funnels, sites, and emails with dynamically synced urgency, expanding into a full conversion platform that replaces Deadline Funnel and Elfsight with evergreen timers, behavioral triggers, smart expiry actions, and measurable conversion analytics.  Execution & Cross-Functional Leadership Translate vision and PRDs (Template Library platform, Brand Board, Countdown Timer) into prioritized, outcome-driven roadmaps and shipped outcomes.Run structured discovery: customer interviews (agency owners, agency designers, end customers), prototype testing, workflow audits, and competitive analysis (Canva, Figma, Webflow templates, Google Pomelli, Deadline Funnel, Elfsight, and emerging AI design tools).Collaborate closely with:Engineering to plan, scope, and deliver platform-quality releases — especially given the cross-product integration surface area Design to build intuitive, scalable UX for creation, brand setup, and timer configuration AI/ML to ship generative templates, brand extraction, and clone-any-asset capabilities Data/Analytics to instrument metrics, prove conversion lift, and measure marketplace and adoption health Sales/CS/Support to shape enablement, packaging, monetization mechanics, and feedback loops Partner/Marketplace teams for the agency template monetization motion (creator onboarding, payouts, governance) Drive alignment and narrative: clearly communicate tradeoffs, decisions, and progress to stakeholders and leadership.What You'll Bring 8+ years in Product Management Experience in one or more of:Template, design, or creation products (Canva-class, Figma, Webflow, email/landing-page builders) Brand systems, design systems, or DAM (digital asset management) products Marketplace or creator-monetization platforms (template marketplaces, app stores, plugin ecosystems) Conversion/marketing tools (timers, popups, personalization, A/B testing, urgency widgets) Cross-product platform surfaces that integrate into many product areas Strong design and creation product sensibility — you have opinions about editor UX, "make it mine" flows, and what makes a creation product feel magical Strong analytical and technical fluency:Comfortable partnering with Engineering/Data/AI on data flows, generative pipelines, and integration patterns Can define robust metrics for adoption, monetization, and conversion lift Can reason about APIs, embeds, multi-product integration, and scalable configuration frameworks Proven track record of moving business metrics (adoption, retention, expansion, monetization, conversion) Bonus: experience shipping AI-powered creation features, marketplace mechanics, or replacing established third-party tools with native capabilities Demonstrated ability to lead without authority, influence cross-functional partners, and drive alignment across Product, Engineering, Design, Data, AI, and GTM Excellent written and verbal communication; can create crisp narratives for executives and individual contributors How Success Will Be Measured (First 12 Months) A clear, aligned 12–18 month roadmap for Template Library, Brand Board, and Countdown Timer is defined and in execution Meaningful improvements in:Template adoption and breadth (templates used per account, cross-product template usage, time-to-first-asset) Agency template monetization (creators onboarded, templates listed, GMV from agency-created templates) Brand Board attach and propagation (% of accounts with a completed Brand Board, % of assets created using Brand Board values, multi-product reuse) Countdown Timer adoption and impact (timers deployed across funnels/sites/emails, measurable conversion lift, displacement of Deadline Funnel/Elfsight usage among customers) AI feature adoption (usage of AI-generated templates, clone-any-asset, brand auto-extraction) — with a credible path to "AI-first" creation Strong internal adoption and understanding of these capabilities by Sales, CS, and Support (enablement, demos, consistent positioning)  You are seen as the single-threaded owner and strategic leader for creation, brand, and conversion-engagement primitives across the platformEqual Employment Opportunity InformationThe company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
descriptionHtml:
About Us

HighLevel is an AI-powered business operating system that gives agencies, entrepreneurs and SMBs the infrastructure to build, automate and scale. Today, HighLevel supports SMBs across 150+ countries, fueling community-driven growth rooted in real customer outcomes.

To date, businesses operating on HighLevel have generated over $7 billion in ecosystem value, demonstrating the impact of shared infrastructure at scale. By centralizing conversations, automation and intelligence into one system, we help businesses move faster, reduce complexity and execute efficiently.

Behind the platform, HighLevel powers more than 4 billion API hits and 2.5 billion message events daily. With 250 terabytes of distributed data, 250+ microservices and over 1 million domain names supported, our architecture is built for performance, resilience and long-term scalability.

Our people

With over 2,000 team members across 10+ countries, HighLevel operates as a global, remote-first organization built for speed and ownership. We value initiative, clarity and execution, creating space for ambitious people to build systems that support millions of businesses worldwide. Here, innovation thrives, ideas are celebrated and people come first, no matter where they call home.

Our impact

Every month, HighLevel enables more than 1.5 billion messages, 200 million leads and 20 million conversations for the more than 1 million businesses we support. Behind those numbers are real people building independence, expanding opportunity and creating measurable impact. We’re proud to be a part of that.

Learn more about us on our YouTube Channel or Blog Posts

About The Team

The Product team is responsible for driving lead generation and management of leads. We do this by building innovative products & features that solve real-world problems for agencies and allow them to consolidate their offering to their clients in a single platform packaged under their white-labled brand.

The marketing products OS team focuses exclusively on products that can demonstrate lead generation and drive up engagement, adoption in target segments. This team handles multiple product areas including Dashboard and Reporting, Blogging, Social Planner, Email Marketing, Chat widget, Affiliate manager, Chat Widget, Template Library, Brand Boards etc.

HighLevel is an exciting place to work as it gives adrenaline to build and help our user base.

  • We take care of our team so our team can take care of our users
  • It’s never somebody else’s job - Take ownership as a company owner
  • We are passionately focussed on adding value for our users
  • We deliver fast using lean principles (Agile framework). We go to market in weeks instead of quarters
  • A good innovative idea always gets tested and we deliver based on feedbacks
  • We embrace that improvement is constant and iterative.
  • Constant Learning Growth graph - You will learn how to scale B2B SaaS Startup and build relevant, impactful products for customers
  • We are do-ers and go-getters to achieve team adoptions.

Role Overview

We're looking for a Senior Product Manager to lead the strategy and execution for our Template Library, Brand Board, and Countdown Timer initiatives.

You'll own the end-to-end product vision for how agency owners, subaccount users, marketers, and end customers create on-brand assets at scale, codify their business DNA, and drive urgency-based conversions inside HighLevel — turning fragmented design assets, brand identity, and conversion tooling into a unified, AI-powered creation ecosystem that spans every product surface.

This is a highly strategic, cross-cutting role with outsized impact on time-to-value, agency monetization, brand consistency, and conversion lift — transforming three foundational platform capabilities into category-defining products that can replace best-in-class point solutions (Canva-class design surfaces, Google Pomelli-style brand systems, Deadline Funnel, and Elfsight).

What You'll Own 1. Strategy & Vision

Own the north-star vision and roadmap for:

  • Template Library (multi-product, marketplace-ready, AI-enhanced creation engine)
  • Brand Board (centralized business DNA that flows into every HighLevel product)
  • Countdown Timer (multi-surface, dynamically synced, conversion-focused engagement primitive)

Translate company strategy into clear, measurable product outcomes (e.g., template adoption, agency template revenue, brand-board attach rate, cross-product asset reuse, timer-driven conversion lift, replacement of third-party tools like Deadline Funnel and Elfsight).

Map and deeply understand the ecosystem: agency owners, agency designers/marketers, subaccount users, end customers, template creators (monetizing agencies), and enterprise stakeholders standardizing brand at scale.

  • Product Specific Responsibilities
  • Template Library: Own the end-to-end vision for a multi-product template catalog spanning 12+ HighLevel surfaces, from niche-based discovery and agency template monetization to a Canva-class, AI-native creation engine — enabling users to generate, clone, and customize on-brand assets from a prompt or URL.
  • Brand Board: Build and maintain HighLevel's single source of truth for business identity — capturing logos, colors, typography, and voice — and ensure those values propagate automatically across every product surface, with a roadmap toward AI-powered brand extraction, smart drift detection, and generative brand asset creation.
  • Countdown Timer: Own a multi-surface conversion primitive that embeds across funnels, sites, and emails with dynamically synced urgency, expanding into a full conversion platform that replaces Deadline Funnel and Elfsight with evergreen timers, behavioral triggers, smart expiry actions, and measurable conversion analytics.
  • Execution & Cross-Functional Leadership Translate vision and PRDs (Template Library platform, Brand Board, Countdown Timer) into prioritized, outcome-driven roadmaps and shipped outcomes.

    • Run structured discovery: customer interviews (agency owners, agency designers, end customers), prototype testing, workflow audits, and competitive analysis (Canva, Figma, Webflow templates, Google Pomelli, Deadline Funnel, Elfsight, and emerging AI design tools).

    Collaborate closely with:

    • Engineering to plan, scope, and deliver platform-quality releases — especially given the cross-product integration surface area
    • Design to build intuitive, scalable UX for creation, brand setup, and timer configuration
    • AI/ML to ship generative templates, brand extraction, and clone-any-asset capabilities
    • Data/Analytics to instrument metrics, prove conversion lift, and measure marketplace and adoption health
    • Sales/CS/Support to shape enablement, packaging, monetization mechanics, and feedback loops
    • Partner/Marketplace teams for the agency template monetization motion (creator onboarding, payouts, governance)

    Drive alignment and narrative: clearly communicate tradeoffs, decisions, and progress to stakeholders and leadership.

    What You'll Bring
  • 8+ years in Product Management
  • Experience in one or more of:
    • Template, design, or creation products (Canva-class, Figma, Webflow, email/landing-page builders)
    • Brand systems, design systems, or DAM (digital asset management) products
    • Marketplace or creator-monetization platforms (template marketplaces, app stores, plugin ecosystems)
    • Conversion/marketing tools (timers, popups, personalization, A/B testing, urgency widgets)
    • Cross-product platform surfaces that integrate into many product areas
  • Strong design and creation product sensibility — you have opinions about editor UX, "make it mine" flows, and what makes a creation product feel magical
  • Strong analytical and technical fluency:
    • Comfortable partnering with Engineering/Data/AI on data flows, generative pipelines, and integration patterns
    • Can define robust metrics for adoption, monetization, and conversion lift
    • Can reason about APIs, embeds, multi-product integration, and scalable configuration frameworks
  • Proven track record of moving business metrics (adoption, retention, expansion, monetization, conversion)
  • Bonus: experience shipping AI-powered creation features, marketplace mechanics, or replacing established third-party tools with native capabilities
  • Demonstrated ability to lead without authority, influence cross-functional partners, and drive alignment across Product, Engineering, Design, Data, AI, and GTM
  • Excellent written and verbal communication; can create crisp narratives for executives and individual contributors
How Success Will Be Measured (First 12 Months)

  • A clear, aligned 12–18 month roadmap for Template Library, Brand Board, and Countdown Timer is defined and in execution
  • Meaningful improvements in:
    • Template adoption and breadth (templates used per account, cross-product template usage, time-to-first-asset)
    • Agency template monetization (creators onboarded, templates listed, GMV from agency-created templates)
    • Brand Board attach and propagation (% of accounts with a completed Brand Board, % of assets created using Brand Board values, multi-product reuse)
    • Countdown Timer adoption and impact (timers deployed across funnels/sites/emails, measurable conversion lift, displacement of Deadline Funnel/Elfsight usage among customers)
    • AI feature adoption (usage of AI-generated templates, clone-any-asset, brand auto-extraction) — with a credible path to "AI-first" creation
  • Strong internal adoption and understanding of these capabilities by Sales, CS, and Support (enablement, demos, consistent positioning)
You are seen as the single-threaded owner and strategic leader for creation, brand, and conversion-engagement primitives across the platform

Equal Employment Opportunity Information

The company is an Equal Opportunity Employer. As an employer subject to affirmative action regulations, we invite you to voluntarily provide the following demographic information. This information is used solely for compliance with government recordkeeping, reporting, and other legal requirements. Providing this information is voluntary and refusal to do so will not affect your application status. This data will be kept separate from your application and will not be used in the hiring decision.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Sr Manager of Sales - Institutional Products
