Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to contract closure.Coordinate with cross-functional teams (legal, operations, marketing, finance) to ensure smooth contract negotiations, implementation, and fulfillment. Support renewals, expansions, and upselling opportunities while maintaining accurate records of contract status and revenue forecasts.Maintain pipeline hygiene and accurate forecasting using Salesforce or similar CRM systems. Ensure timely updates on prospects, leads, and deal progress.Monitor industry trends, market developments, and competitor activities related to assessment services. Use insights to refine sales tactics and differentiate ETS offerings in the market.Track KPIs and progress toward targets. Prepare regular reports for senior management highlighting performance, market insights, and revenue projections.Assist in developing pricing strategies and proposal documentation for institutional and enterprise customers.Represent ETS at conferences, webinars, and regional marketing initiatives to build brand visibility and generate leads.Knowledge/SkillsProven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets and driving revenue growth.Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.Ability to work independently and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.Strategic thinker with the ability to identify and pursue business opportunities.Results-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.Proficiency in CRM software (e.g., Salesforce) and other sales tools.Education And ExperienceBachelor’s degree in a relevant field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.8+ years of experience in B2B sales, preferably within the education sector, assessment industry, or large-scale consulting solutions.ETS is mission driven and action orientedWe are passionate about hiring innovative thinkers who believe in the promise of education and lifelong learning.We are energized by cultivating growth, innovation, and continuous transformation for the next generation of rising professionals as leaders. Â In support of this ETS offers multiple Business Resource Groups (BRG) for you to learn and advance your career growth!As a not-for-profit organization we will encourage you to lean in to your passion for volunteering. Â At ETS you may qualify for up to an additional 8 hours of PTO for volunteer work on causes that are important to you! ETS is an Equal Opportunity Employer. descriptionHtml:
About ETS

ETS is a global education and talent solutions organization enabling lifelong learners worldwide to be future-ready. For more than 75 years, we've been advancing the science of measurement to build benchmarks for fair and valid skill assessment across cultures and borders. Our worldwide impact extends through our renowned assessments including TOEFL®, TOEIC®, GRE® and Praxis® tests, serving millions of learners in more than 200 countries and territories. Through strategic acquisitions, we've expanded our global capabilities: PSI strengthens our workforce assessment solutions, while Edusoft, Kira Talent, Pipplet, Vericant, and Wheebox enhance our educational technology and assessment platforms across critical markets worldwide.

Through ETS Research Institute and ETS Solutions, we're partnering with educational institutions, governments, and organizations globally to promote skill proficiency, empower upward mobility, and unlock opportunities for everyone, everywhere. With offices and partners across Asia, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas, we deliver nearly 50 million tests annually. Join us in our journey of measuring progress to power human progress worldwide.

Position Summary

The Senior Manager of Sales is responsible for executing ETS’s sales strategy across South Asia, focusing on revenue growth, pipeline management, and relationship building with institutions, corporates, and channel partners. This role reports directly to the Regional Lead – South Asia and emphasizes tactical planning, hands-on execution, and collaboration with internal teams.

Primary Responsibilites

  • Implement strategic sales plan across South Asia. Focus on lead generation, customer acquisition, contract negotiations, and revenue growth in alignment with defined objectives.
  • Proactively identify potential clients and build strong relationships with key stakeholders across sectors. Communicate the value proposition of ETS assessment solutions and tailor proposals to client needs. Manage the full sales cycle from prospecting to contract closure.
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams (legal, operations, marketing, finance) to ensure smooth contract negotiations, implementation, and fulfillment. Support renewals, expansions, and upselling opportunities while maintaining accurate records of contract status and revenue forecasts.
  • Maintain pipeline hygiene and accurate forecasting using Salesforce or similar CRM systems. Ensure timely updates on prospects, leads, and deal progress.
  • Monitor industry trends, market developments, and competitor activities related to assessment services. Use insights to refine sales tactics and differentiate ETS offerings in the market.
  • Track KPIs and progress toward targets. Prepare regular reports for senior management highlighting performance, market insights, and revenue projections.
  • Assist in developing pricing strategies and proposal documentation for institutional and enterprise customers.
  • Represent ETS at conferences, webinars, and regional marketing initiatives to build brand visibility and generate leads.

Knowledge/Skills

  • Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets and driving revenue growth.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.
  • Ability to work independently and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.
  • Strategic thinker with the ability to identify and pursue business opportunities.
  • Results-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving and decision-making skills.
  • Proficiency in CRM software (e.g., Salesforce) and other sales tools.

Education And Experience

  • Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field; MBA or advanced degree preferred.
  • 8+ years of experience in B2B sales, preferably within the education sector, assessment industry, or large-scale consulting solutions.

ETS is mission driven and action oriented

  • We are passionate about hiring innovative thinkers who believe in the promise of education and lifelong learning.
  • We are energized by cultivating growth, innovation, and continuous transformation for the next generation of rising professionals as leaders. Â In support of this ETS offers multiple Business Resource Groups (BRG) for you to learn and advance your career growth!
  • As a not-for-profit organization we will encourage you to lean in to your passion for volunteering. Â At ETS you may qualify for up to an additional 8 hours of PTO for volunteer work on causes that are important to you!

ETS is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, marital status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe in creating a work environment where all individuals are treated with respect and dignity.

Our teams of technology, business, and customer service professionals in Bangalore, India, are working together to transform healthcare delivery in the United States through innovation and collaboration. descriptionHtml:
Company Introduction

Availity is one of the leading health information networks in the United States, processing more than 4 billion transactions annually and connecting more than two million healthcare providers and over two thousand technology partners to health plans nationwide. Our teams of technology, business, and customer service professionals in Bangalore, India, are working together to transform healthcare delivery in the United States through innovation and collaboration. Our technologists help develop cutting-edge revenue cycle solutions that help hospitals, health systems, and physicians maximize payments and optimize their workflows.

Availity is a diverse group of people whose talents, curiosity and passion steer the company to create innovative solutions for the US Healthcare industry. If you are a driven, creative and collaborative individual, with exceptional technology skills to drive innovation, we want to hear from you.

Job Description

Directs a comprehensive product strategy from product conception and definition through end of life. Functions as a central resource with design, manufacturing, quality, test, marketing and distribution as the product(s) move through their lifecycle. Directs those involved in the design, modification and evaluation of all phases of a specific product or group of products. Formulates and executes long-term plans for cost/profit control. Promotes use of new technologies and industry-leading trends. Selects, develops and evaluates personnel to ensure the efficient operation of the function.

Roles & Responsibilities

Job Title: Senior Product Manager

Location: Bangalore, India (India GCC) / Hybrid

(Works closely with global product, engineering, design, and commercial teams)

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own and drive the end‑to‑end strategy, discovery, delivery, and outcomes for a defined product area. This role goes beyond backlog management—it requires strong customer and market insight, strategic thinking, data‑driven decision making, and cross‑functional leadership.

The Senior Product Manager will play a key role in shaping multi‑quarter roadmaps, identifying high‑impact opportunities, and delivering measurable business outcomes for providers, payers, and partners in the US healthcare ecosystem.

Required Qualifications (must Have)

  • 12+ years of experience in Product Management, with ownership of complex, customer‑facing products.
  • Proven experience owning product strategy, discovery, and delivery end‑to‑end.
  • Strong ability to work in ambiguous, cross‑functional environments and drive clarity.
  • Excellent communication skills—able to influence and align stakeholders at all levels.
  • Experience working with Agile / Lean product development teams.
  • Experience in US healthcare, healthcare IT, SaaS platforms, or regulated domains.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Strong data literacy and comfort using metrics to drive decisions.
  • Experience in building AI native products.
  • Product innovation experience (0-1)
  • Experience working with global or distributed teams.
  • Familiarity with Clinical data analysis, provider, payer, clearinghouse, or API‑driven ecosystems.

Eligibility

Key Responsibilities

Product Strategy & Vision

  • Own the product vision and multi‑quarter roadmap for a defined product or portfolio area, balancing near‑term delivery with long‑term strategic bets.
  • Identify and articulate customer problems, market opportunities, and strategic trade‑offs to senior stakeholders.
  • Anticipate industry, regulatory, and market shifts in US healthcare and translate them into product direction and investment choices.

Customer & Market Discovery

  • Lead product discovery by synthesizing customer research, usage data, support insights, and market signals.
  • Translate insights into clear problem statements, opportunity areas, and value hypotheses—not just feature requests.
  • Partner with UX and research teams to validate problems and solutions early and continuously.

End‑to‑End Product Ownership

  • Own initiatives from discovery through launch and post‑launch optimization, treating outcomes—not launch—as the measure of success.
  • Define success metrics, constraints, and acceptance criteria before development begins to enable fast, confident execution.
  • Proactively manage dependencies, risks, and sequencing across teams.

Execution & Cross‑Functional Leadership

  • Work closely with Engineering, Design, QA, Data, Sales, and Operations to deliver high‑quality outcomes.
  • Manage, mentor product management team.
  • Act as the single‑threaded owner for product decisions within the area of responsibility.
  • Communicate product initiatives clearly using structured frameworks (e.g., Problem → Impact → Solution → Benefit → Value).

Data, Metrics & Outcomes

  • Define and track product success metrics tied to business goals such as adoption, efficiency, cost reduction, revenue, and customer satisfaction.
  • Use data to evaluate performance, generate insights, and influence future roadmap decisions.
  • Hold yourself and the team accountable for measurable outcomes, not just outputs.

What Success Looks Like In This Role

  • Clear, outcome‑based product direction that aligns teams and stakeholders.
  • Roadmaps that reflect customer value, business impact, and strategic intent.
  • Products that demonstrate measurable improvements in adoption, efficiency, cost, or customer satisfaction.
  • Trusted partnership with engineering, design, and business teams.

Video Camera Usage

Availity fosters a collaborative and open culture where communication and engagement are central to our success. As a remote first company, we are also camera-first and provide all associates with camera/video capability to simulate the office environment. If you are not able to use your camera for all virtual meetings, you should not apply for this role.

Having cameras on helps create a more connected, interactive, and productive environment, allowing teams to communicate more effectively and build stronger working relationships. The usage of cameras also enhances security and protects sensitive company information. Video participation is required to ensure that only authorized personnel are present in meetings and to prevent unauthorized access, data breaches, preventing social engineering, or the sharing of confidential information with non-participants.

title: Senior Product Manager
description: About JosysJosys is a fast-growing B2B SaaS startup on a mission to simplify and automate IT operations for the modern workplace. Backed by $218M in Series A & B funding and a successful launch in Japan, we’re expanding globally with a footprint in 9 countries and a cutting-edge tech hub in Bengaluru, India.Spun off from RAKSUL (a Forbes Startup of the Year), Josys offers an all-in-one platform for SaaS and device management, giving IT teams 360° visibility and powerful automation—from employee onboarding to offboarding.With remote work and SaaS sprawl on the rise, Josys helps businesses cut IT costs by up to 75%, boost security, and stay compliant—all while making IT teams super efficient.Position OverviewWe are looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to join Josys and help shape the future of AI-Powered SaaS management.As a Senior Product Manager at Josys, you’ll play a critical role in building a user-centric B2B SaaS product that streamlines IT SaaS operations, drives automation, and delivers tangible value to enterprises. You’ll own key product areas, collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, and lead initiatives from discovery to launch. This is a high-impact role where you’ll influence product strategy, prioritize what matters most, and ensure we ship solutions that scale.Location: Bengaluru, India (Hybrid)As a Senior Product Manager At Josys, You WillUnderstand market trends & user needs to identify meaningful customer pain points, and translate them into intuitive, scalable product solutions.Break down complex problem statements into actionable, incremental product delivery.Own quarterly planning and roadmap creation for your product domain, setting clear short-term and long-term objectives.Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, marketing, sales, and customer success teams to define product requirements and drive end-to-end execution.Conduct customer interviews and analyze feedback to uncover insights that inform product decisions, enhancements, and new feature development.Lead User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to validate features and ensure the product meets user expectations before launch.Track adoption and usage of delivered features, gather user feedback and data insights, and drive iterative improvements to maximize product impact.What You'll BringBachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, or related field. MBA is a plus.5+ years of product management experience, particularly in the B2B SaaS domain.Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills, with a keen eye for detail.Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.Proven ability to lead and align cross-functional teams to drive shared product successExcellent communication skills, both written and verbal.Proactive and self-motivated, with a continuous learning mindset and a passion for keeping up with emerging technologies and industry trends.
descriptionHtml:
About Josys

Josys is a fast-growing B2B SaaS startup on a mission to simplify and automate IT operations for the modern workplace. Backed by $218M in Series A & B funding and a successful launch in Japan, we’re expanding globally with a footprint in 9 countries and a cutting-edge tech hub in Bengaluru, India.

Spun off from RAKSUL (a Forbes Startup of the Year), Josys offers an all-in-one platform for SaaS and device management, giving IT teams 360° visibility and powerful automation—from employee onboarding to offboarding.

With remote work and SaaS sprawl on the rise, Josys helps businesses cut IT costs by up to 75%, boost security, and stay compliant—all while making IT teams super efficient.

Position Overview

We are looking for an experienced Senior Product Manager to join Josys and help shape the future of AI-Powered SaaS management.

As a Senior Product Manager at Josys, you’ll play a critical role in building a user-centric B2B SaaS product that streamlines IT SaaS operations, drives automation, and delivers tangible value to enterprises. You’ll own key product areas, collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, and lead initiatives from discovery to launch. This is a high-impact role where you’ll influence product strategy, prioritize what matters most, and ensure we ship solutions that scale.

Location: Bengaluru, India (Hybrid)

As a Senior Product Manager At Josys, You Will

  • Understand market trends & user needs to identify meaningful customer pain points, and translate them into intuitive, scalable product solutions.
  • Break down complex problem statements into actionable, incremental product delivery.
  • Own quarterly planning and roadmap creation for your product domain, setting clear short-term and long-term objectives.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, marketing, sales, and customer success teams to define product requirements and drive end-to-end execution.
  • Conduct customer interviews and analyze feedback to uncover insights that inform product decisions, enhancements, and new feature development.
  • Lead User Acceptance Testing (UAT) to validate features and ensure the product meets user expectations before launch.
  • Track adoption and usage of delivered features, gather user feedback and data insights, and drive iterative improvements to maximize product impact.

What You'll Bring

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, or related field. MBA is a plus.
  • 5+ years of product management experience, particularly in the B2B SaaS domain.
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills, with a keen eye for detail.
  • Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proven ability to lead and align cross-functional teams to drive shared product success
  • Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
  • Proactive and self-motivated, with a continuous learning mindset and a passion for keeping up with emerging technologies and industry trends.

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Job SummaryNetApp is the only data infrastructure company with first-party and marketplace offerings across the three major hyperscalers – AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud – powering mission-critical and revenue-critical workloads across the Fortune 500 companies. The Marketplace Core team within NetApp’s public cloud storage division is responsible for building industry "best-in-class" infrastructure to drive our business on hyperscaler marketplaces across existing and new marketplace products.We have a unique opportunity in the Marketplace Core team for a Product Manager who will build the rails that empower our marketplace business across the full customer lifecycle. You will be part of the team which owns the vision, strategy, and execution for building and scaling NetApp’s marketplace business. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, GTM, data science, and UX to deliver robust, scalable, and customer-centric services that position our marketplace business for growth. Wherever possible, you will find opportunities to reimagine the customer experience for simplicity and efficiency using an API-first bias and AI tools. descriptionHtml:
Job Summary

NetApp is the only data infrastructure company with first-party and marketplace offerings across the three major hyperscalers – AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud – powering mission-critical and revenue-critical workloads across the Fortune 500 companies. The Marketplace Core team within NetApp’s public cloud storage division is responsible for building industry "best-in-class" infrastructure to drive our business on hyperscaler marketplaces across existing and new marketplace products.

We have a unique opportunity in the Marketplace Core team for a Product Manager who will build the rails that empower our marketplace business across the full customer lifecycle. You will be part of the team which owns the vision, strategy, and execution for building and scaling NetApp’s marketplace business. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, GTM, data science, and UX to deliver robust, scalable, and customer-centric services that position our marketplace business for growth. Wherever possible, you will find opportunities to reimagine the customer experience for simplicity and efficiency using an API-first bias and AI tools. This is a high-impact role for a product leader passionate about marketplaces and automation.

Job Requirements

  • Define and articulate the product features, strategy, and roadmap for marketplace core, aligning with NetApp’s business goals and customer needs.
  • Own the full product lifecycle: ideation, requirements gathering, prioritization, development, launch, iteration, and growth.
  • Partner with engineering, data science, and design teams to deliver high-quality, scalable, and resilient services.
  • Develop and maintain a transparent, prioritized product backlog; write detailed PRFAQ documents, user stories and product requirements.
  • Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for product and feature success; use data-driven insights to iterate and improve.
  • Stay at the forefront of AI innovation agentic AI, LLM orchestration, RAG.
  • Communicate product progress, and outcomes to stakeholders, leadership, and cross-functional teams.
  • Support customer onboarding, adoption, and value realization in partnership with GTM and Customer Success teams
  • Experience in product management or related technical role preferably in a SaaS or cloud services company.
  • Experience growing a business on the hyperscaler marketplaces is preferred.
  • Strong experience in defining product roadmap, authoring product requirements and launching cloud services.
  • Ability to analyze data, problem-solve, analyze trade-offs, and scope business requirements.
  • Excellent oral and written communication skills with the ability to influence others internally and externally.

Education

  • Bachelor of Engineering or, Data Science or Information Systems along with an MBA or Master’s degree with 8-12 years of relevant product management experience.

At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.

Equal Opportunity Employer

NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.

Why You'll Thrive at NetApp

At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.

NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.

Our culture

We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.

If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

descriptionHtml:
Let’s Build What’s Next, Together.

We are Spotnana. We’re on a mission to modernize the infrastructure of the $1.6 trillion travel industry to power the perfect trip for travelers everywhere. Our Travel-as-a-Service platform is designed to make every trip better, whether someone is booking for work or leisure travel, building a travel tool, or looking to offer personalized experiences at scale.

We’re not just modernizing tech, we’re rethinking how the industry works. And to get there, we’re bringing together innovative, ambitious, and open-minded people who want to build something that lasts.

At Spotnana, our values and principles guide how we work and grow together:

  • Build the future – We are leaders, we are innovators, we are ambitious.
  • Commit to excellence – We’re accountable, we are partners, we are agile.
  • Stronger together – We lead with respect and integrity, we are inclusive, we are lifelong learners.

Who: You! And the rest of the Product Engineering department & their cross-functional partners

What: A Senior Product Manager position title and an outstanding Problem-solving & Collaboration skills

When: ASAP! We are looking to hire and onboard a new hire as soon as we find the right person for the job. Exciting work awaits!

Where: Hybrid: Our office hub location of Bengaluru – you will be required to be in office 1+ days per week in alignment with our office work policy.

Why: Join our dynamic team and be a part of a mission-critical project that will propel Spotnana's growth and success! We're seeking versatile Product Managers with leadership qualities, a passion for problem-solving, and the enthusiasm to take on new challenges as we push the boundaries of technology. At Spotnana, we are an API-first company, leading the charge in innovative solutions.

How (to land the job!): The process typically begins with an introductory call with a member of our Talent Acquisition team, where we'll discuss your background, career aspirations, and what makes Spotnana a great fit for you. Then a live virtual interview with a panel of engineers and hiring managers.

The Day-to-day

  • Product Strategy & Vision: Define and communicate product strategy and vision, working closely with stakeholders across the organization.
  • Customer Insight & Market Analysis: Understand and anticipate customer needs through direct interaction, market research, and competitive analysis.
  • Product Roadmap: Develop and maintain a product roadmap, prioritizing features based on business impact and customer needs.
  • Cross-functional Leadership: Collaborate with engineering, design, marketing, sales, and customer success teams to deliver innovative products and features.
  • Product Launch: Oversee successful product launches, working with the marketing team on go-to-market strategies.
  • Product Performance: Monitor key performance metrics to ensure product success and continuous improvement.

Skills & Qualities We Value

  • 5+ years of experience in product management, preferably in a SaaS or technology product environment within the travel industry.
  • Proven experience in a fast-paced, customer-focused role, with the ability to stay closely connected to the customer's needs.
  • Strong leadership skills, with the ability to influence cross-functional teams
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Deep understanding of customer needs and a customer-focused approach
  • Proven track record of managing all aspects of a successful product throughout its lifecycle
  • Technical background, with understanding or hands-on experience in software development and web technologies.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to think outside the box and roll up one’s sleeves to get the job done.
  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Perks & Benefits You Will Love

Spotnana strives to offer fair, industry-competitive, and equitable compensation. Our approach assesses total compensation, including cash, annual performance bonus, company equity, and comprehensive benefits.

We care for the people who make everything possible - our benefits include:

  • Comprehensive benefit plans covering medical for self, spouse, children and parents including free doctor consultations; employee assistance program effective on your hire date
  • Group accidental coverage for all employees.
  • 18 privilege leaves, 12 casual/sick leave days per year in addition to 12 company holidays with an open choice holidays, quarterly recharge/wellness days and an end-of-year company shutdown
  • Up to 26 weeks of parental leave
  • Monthly cell phone/internet stipend
  • Meal allowance
  • Wellness/gym reimbursement
  • Employee retirement planning such as corporate NPS and EPF

We are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive environment and to encourage these values in everyone on our team. We provide an environment of mutual respect where opportunities are available without regard to race, color, religion, sex, pregnancy (including childbirth, lactation and related medical conditions), national origin, age, physical and mental disability, marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, genetic information (including characteristics and testing), military and veteran status, and any other characteristic protected by applicable law. We believe that diversity and inclusion for people from all walks of life is key to our success as a company.

Protect yourself from recruitment scams - All recruiting outreach and communication comes directly from our internal team via an email with an @spotnana.com address or through LinkedIn. We encourage candidates to verify the source of any outreach before sharing personal information. We do not use external recruiting partners for our hiring efforts or Microsoft Teams for interviews. We will never ask you to pay for equipment, training, visa fees, or anything else during the hiring process. We do not extend offers via text-based apps or use Microsoft Teams for interviews. All legitimate openings are listed at https://www.spotnana.com/careers/careers-listing/.

Strong grasp of DX: information architecture for docs, quickstarts, SDK stewardship, error design. API monetization/packaging, partner marketplaces, or appecosystem playbooks. Observability for integrations (schema drift detection, tracing, deadlettering, replay tools). How We’ll Measure SuccessAdoption of v2 endpoints & webhook subscriptions; reduction in partner integration time. Reliability (SLO attainment), latency improvements, and error rate reductions for integration flows. Partner and developer satisfaction (NPS/CSAT), documentation usability scores, and support ticket deflection. Because We Care, We OfferA flexible work environment Competitive salaries, paid vacation, and holidays Robust professional development programs Comprehensive health, wellness, and financial packages SHARED AMBITION. INSPIRED FUTURE.At Alegeus, our success is guided by our aligned vision and values—it is how we work together and collaborate to achieve our goals.People First. We pride ourselves in bringing talented people together and treating one another with care. Partner Powered. We are committed to empowering our partners, knowing our success is shared and we win as one. Always Advancing. We want to create the best place anyone has ever worked.” - Alegeus employeeApply now, connect a friend to this opportunity, or sign up for job alerts!We are committed to a policy of Equal Employment Opportunity and will not discriminate against an applicant or employee on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, sex, age, physical or mental disability, veteran or military status, genetic information, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally recognized protected basis under federal, state or local laws, regulations or ordinances. The information collected by this application is solely to determine suitability for employment, verify identity and maintain employment statistics on applicants. At Alegeus, being transparent about our compensation philosophy and approach is more than just a legal requirement. As our organization continues to grow and evolve, we have made a commitment to ensure that our compensation framework is equitable, data-driven, consistent, and unbiased, with allowable pay differences based on factors unique to each candidate (think: skills, experience, qualifications, etc.) in order to attract and retain a highly talented and committed workforce.We are taking an “inside-out” approach to pay transparency by first educating our valued managers and internal workforce and then moving to publishing compensation ranges externally. In the interim, if you are a California, Colorado, Connecticut, Maryland, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Ohio or Washington resident and this role is physically available in your state or classified as remote, you may be eligible to receive additional information about the compensation and benefits for this role, which we will provide upon request. Please send an email identifying the title of the role you are interested in and the state you reside in to talentacquisitionteam@alegeus.com.Alegeus may use AI technology during candidate interviews. The uses include recording, note-taking, and summarizing candidate interviews. The information generated by the AI technology will be used by Alegeus during the hiring process. If you wish to opt out of having AI technology transcribe your interview, please notify your recruiter in advance of the interview. Otherwise, by agreeing to an interview with us, you consent to the use of AI technology during your interview.
descriptionHtml:
Do you want to shape the future of fintech and healthtech? Energized by challenges and inspired by bold goals? Ready to elevate your career alongside driven and talented colleagues? If that sounds like you, explore a career at Alegeus today. Opportunity Happens Here.

Responsibilities

Alegeus is modernizing into an API first, open integration platform that powers partners, employers, and participants across consumer- directed- healthcare. You will own the Integrations product surface so that partners can integrate faster with higher reliability, enabling new experiences and AI/agentic workflows. Integration

Ownership Scope

You will own all external integration modalities at Alegeus, including:

  • Data integrations: Public APIs, webhooks, event streams, real-time interfaces, and asynchronous messaging patterns File-based integrations: EDI, CSV, batch processing, and secure file transfer (e.g., SFTP) Experience integrations: front-end microservices, embeddable widgets, and partner-facing UI extensions
  • This role ensures that the above is designed, delivered, and evolved as one cohesive platform, not disconnected channels, with shared standards for security, versioning, observability, reliability, and partner experience.


Outcomes you’ll own

  • Reduce partner timetofirstvalue and increase adoption across key use cases.
  • Ship a coherent v2 API set with clear versioning, deprecation, and a reliable release cadence.
  • Launch a webhook/event framework (subscribe, replay, DLQ, idempotency) with partnergrade SLAs.
  • Deliver a developer experience that delights: dev portal, docs, SDKs, samples, error taxonomy, sandbox, chatbot, etc.
  • Establish product analytics & KPIs (adoption, latency, reliability, errors, partner NPS) with dashboards.


Key Responsibilities

  • Own the roadmap for Data, File and Experience integrations; define problem statements, success metrics, and crisp PRDs.
  • Partner with design/engineering/Product owners to deliver secure, scalable interfaces and reference implementations.
  • Work directly with marquee partners to map JTBD and translate into stable contracts/schemas.
  • Drive packaging, auth models (OAuth/OIDC), rate limits, quotas, SLAs, and change management.
  • Orchestrate launches: docs, changelogs, guides, enablement, and internal readiness.


Required Qualifications

  • 6–10+ years in PM with SaaS integrations as your product (not just “has APIs”).
  • Handson track record shipping public REST APIs & webhooks at scale; familiarity with async patterns, retries, backoff, and event semantics.
  • Strong grasp of DX: information architecture for docs, quickstarts, SDK stewardship, error design.
  • Data exchange expertise: realtime + bulk, schema evolution, validation, and observability for integrations.
  • Excellent partnerfacing skills: discovery, solutioning, negotiating tradeoffs, clear communication.


Nice to have

  • Healthcare, claims/eligibility, fintech/payments, or benefits ecosystem experience.
  • API monetization/packaging, partner marketplaces, or appecosystem playbooks.
  • Observability for integrations (schema drift detection, tracing, deadlettering, replay tools).


How We’ll Measure Success

  • Adoption of v2 endpoints & webhook subscriptions; reduction in partner integration time.
  • Reliability (SLO attainment), latency improvements, and error rate reductions for integration flows.
  • Partner and developer satisfaction (NPS/CSAT), documentation usability scores, and support ticket deflection.


Because We Care, We Offer

  • A flexible work environment
  • Competitive salaries, paid vacation, and holidays
  • Robust professional development programs
  • Comprehensive health, wellness, and financial packages


SHARED AMBITION. INSPIRED FUTURE.

At Alegeus, our success is guided by our aligned vision and values—it is how we work together and collaborate to achieve our goals.

  • People First. We pride ourselves in bringing talented people together and treating one another with care.
  • Partner Powered. We are committed to empowering our partners, knowing our success is shared and we win as one.
  • Always Advancing. We are driven by potential and relentlessly determined to achieve our goals.


“I truly believe that people who are well-skilled and talented can go wherever they want in this company. We want to create the best place anyone has ever worked.” - Alegeus employee

Apply now, connect a friend to this opportunity, or sign up for job alerts!

We are committed to a policy of Equal Employment Opportunity and will not discriminate against an applicant or employee on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, sex, age, physical or mental disability, veteran or military status, genetic information, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally recognized protected basis under federal, state or local laws, regulations or ordinances. The information collected by this application is solely to determine suitability for employment, verify identity and maintain employment statistics on applicants.

At Alegeus, being transparent about our compensation philosophy and approach is more than just a legal requirement. As our organization continues to grow and evolve, we have made a commitment to ensure that our compensation framework is equitable, data-driven, consistent, and unbiased, with allowable pay differences based on factors unique to each candidate (think: skills, experience, qualifications, etc.) in order to attract and retain a highly talented and committed workforce.

We are taking an “inside-out” approach to pay transparency by first educating our valued managers and internal workforce and then moving to publishing compensation ranges externally. In the interim, if you are a California, Colorado, Connecticut, Maryland, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Ohio or Washington resident and this role is physically available in your state or classified as remote, you may be eligible to receive additional information about the compensation and benefits for this role, which we will provide upon request. Please send an email identifying the title of the role you are interested in and the state you reside in to talentacquisitionteam@alegeus.com.

Alegeus may use AI technology during candidate interviews. The uses include recording, note-taking, and summarizing candidate interviews. The information generated by the AI technology will be used by Alegeus during the hiring process. If you wish to opt out of having AI technology transcribe your interview, please notify your recruiter in advance of the interview. Otherwise, by agreeing to an interview with us, you consent to the use of AI technology during your interview.

title: Senior AI Product Manager
description: We are looking for an experienced AI Product Manager who can operate at the intersection of product, technology, client engagement, and execution. This is a high-ownership, enterprise-facing role for someone who is excited by the opportunity to shape cutting-edge AI applications, work directly with international clients, and translate complex business problems into scalable AI-enabled products.The AI Product Manager will lead the definition, shaping, and execution of enterprise AI products and features for global clients. This role requires a rare mix of product judgment, AI fluency, consulting maturity, and hands-on problem solving. You will work closely with clients, engineering teams, designers, and delivery leaders to identify opportunities, define product direction, manage expectations, and bring AI-first solutions to life.The ideal candidate understands how to apply GenAI and agentic patterns in enterprise contexts, is comfortable navigating ambiguity, and is hands-on enough to prototype ideas, validate concepts quickly, and sharpen requirements through action. This is not a purely roadmap or coordination role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, engage credibly with clients, and get into the detail when needed.Key ResponsibilitiesOwn the product definition and execution of enterprise AI applications, workflows, and features from discovery through release and adoptionWork directly with clients and internal stakeholders to identify business problems, frame opportunities, and convert them into clear product requirements and delivery plansShape AI-first user experiences, including copilots, assistants, agentic workflows, decision-support tools, and human-in-the-loop enterprise applicationsTranslate ambiguous business needs into structured product artifacts such as problem statements, user journeys, PRDs, acceptance criteria, prioritization frameworks, and release scopePartner closely with engineering, UX, architecture, and delivery teams to ensure product intent is translated into practical, scalable solutionsDrive workshops, requirement discovery sessions, stakeholder reviews, demos, and alignment discussions with enterprise clients and senior stakeholdersBuild lightweight prototypes, proof-of-concepts, and product mock flows using modern AI tools, no-code/low-code methods, vibe coding, and basic design/prototyping techniques where usefulHelp define and refine AI use cases involving agents, orchestration, retrieval, workflow automation, and enterprise system integrationMaintain a sharp eye for detail across business requirements, product behavior, user experience, and delivery qualityManage client expectations proactively by balancing ambition, technical feasibility, timelines, and delivery realitiesSupport value realization and account growth by identifying follow-on product opportunities, expansion areas, and innovation pathways within client accountsContribute to a product and delivery culture that values speed, clarity, experimentation, accountability, and customer impactWhat Success Looks Like In This RoleEnterprise AI products and features are clearly defined, well-prioritized, and shipped with strong adoption potentialClients see you as a credible product partner who understands both business value and execution constraintsProduct requirements are crisp, actionable, and reduce ambiguity for delivery teamsAI use cases move beyond demos into usable workflows that solve real operational problemsTeams make faster, better decisions because product direction, scope, and trade-offs are well managedClient confidence improves through strong communication, attention to detail, and disciplined expectation managementYou help create momentum for account expansion by spotting practical product and AI opportunities that clients want to invest inRequirements7-14 years of experience in ProApplication formDesign the application form for this role.duct Management, Business Analysis, Consulting, Enterprise Software, Digital Products, or related technology rolesDemonstrated experience working on software products, platforms, or enterprise applications in client-facing environmentsGood understanding of AI/ML and Generative AI concepts, with practical exposure to AI-enabled product design and deliveryExposure to building or shaping agent-based / agentic workflows or AI-driven assistants/copilots in a product or solution contextStrong experience in requirements discovery, user story definition, prioritization, stakeholder management, and cross-functional executionAbility to engage confidently with enterprise clients, business users, engineering teams, and senior internal stakeholdersStrong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complexity and present with clarityHigh attention to detail and the ability to manage product quality and descriptionHtml:
We are looking for an experienced AI Product Manager who can operate at the intersection of product, technology, client engagement, and execution. This is a high-ownership, enterprise-facing role for someone who is excited by the opportunity to shape cutting-edge AI applications, work directly with international clients, and translate complex business problems into scalable AI-enabled products.

The AI Product Manager will lead the definition, shaping, and execution of enterprise AI products and features for global clients. This role requires a rare mix of product judgment, AI fluency, consulting maturity, and hands-on problem solving. You will work closely with clients, engineering teams, designers, and delivery leaders to identify opportunities, define product direction, manage expectations, and bring AI-first solutions to life.

The ideal candidate understands how to apply GenAI and agentic patterns in enterprise contexts, is comfortable navigating ambiguity, and is hands-on enough to prototype ideas, validate concepts quickly, and sharpen requirements through action. This is not a purely roadmap or coordination role. We are looking for someone who can think strategically, engage credibly with clients, and get into the detail when needed.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own the product definition and execution of enterprise AI applications, workflows, and features from discovery through release and adoption
  • Work directly with clients and internal stakeholders to identify business problems, frame opportunities, and convert them into clear product requirements and delivery plans
  • Shape AI-first user experiences, including copilots, assistants, agentic workflows, decision-support tools, and human-in-the-loop enterprise applications
  • Translate ambiguous business needs into structured product artifacts such as problem statements, user journeys, PRDs, acceptance criteria, prioritization frameworks, and release scope
  • Partner closely with engineering, UX, architecture, and delivery teams to ensure product intent is translated into practical, scalable solutions
  • Drive workshops, requirement discovery sessions, stakeholder reviews, demos, and alignment discussions with enterprise clients and senior stakeholders
  • Build lightweight prototypes, proof-of-concepts, and product mock flows using modern AI tools, no-code/low-code methods, vibe coding, and basic design/prototyping techniques where useful
  • Help define and refine AI use cases involving agents, orchestration, retrieval, workflow automation, and enterprise system integration
  • Maintain a sharp eye for detail across business requirements, product behavior, user experience, and delivery quality
  • Manage client expectations proactively by balancing ambition, technical feasibility, timelines, and delivery realities
  • Support value realization and account growth by identifying follow-on product opportunities, expansion areas, and innovation pathways within client accounts
  • Contribute to a product and delivery culture that values speed, clarity, experimentation, accountability, and customer impact

What Success Looks Like In This Role

  • Enterprise AI products and features are clearly defined, well-prioritized, and shipped with strong adoption potential
  • Clients see you as a credible product partner who understands both business value and execution constraints
  • Product requirements are crisp, actionable, and reduce ambiguity for delivery teams
  • AI use cases move beyond demos into usable workflows that solve real operational problems
  • Teams make faster, better decisions because product direction, scope, and trade-offs are well managed
  • Client confidence improves through strong communication, attention to detail, and disciplined expectation management
  • You help create momentum for account expansion by spotting practical product and AI opportunities that clients want to invest in

Requirements

  • 7-14 years of experience in ProApplication formDesign the application form for this role.duct Management, Business Analysis, Consulting, Enterprise Software, Digital Products, or related technology roles
  • Demonstrated experience working on software products, platforms, or enterprise applications in client-facing environments
  • Good understanding of AI/ML and Generative AI concepts, with practical exposure to AI-enabled product design and delivery
  • Exposure to building or shaping agent-based / agentic workflows or AI-driven assistants/copilots in a product or solution context
  • Strong experience in requirements discovery, user story definition, prioritization, stakeholder management, and cross-functional execution
  • Ability to engage confidently with enterprise clients, business users, engineering teams, and senior internal stakeholders
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to simplify complexity and present with clarity
  • High attention to detail and the ability to manage product quality and client expectations in parallel
  • A hands-on mindset with the willingness to prototype, experiment, and validate ideas quickly rather than rely only on documentation
  • Comfort working in ambiguous, fast-evolving environments where AI capabilities, client needs, and product direction are still being shaped

Preferred Qualifications

  • Prior experience in a consulting or client advisory environment is highly desirable
  • Exposure to enterprise domains and business applications is preferred
  • Experience supporting farming-led account expansion, identifying opportunities within existing accounts, or helping grow strategic client relationships is a strong plus
  • Background as a Software Engineer or strong technical foundation is preferred
  • Familiarity with enterprise workflow systems, platform integrations, business process automation, or complex multi-stakeholder applications is a plus
  • Experience creating basic prototypes independently using AI coding tools, prompt-based development, wireframing, or lightweight design tools
  • Strong educational background from top-tier institutions is preferred, including IIMs, IITs, BIT Mesra, BITS Pilani, top NITs, or equivalent institutions

Skills And Capability Areas

  • AI product thinking and practical GenAI application
  • Agentic workflow understanding and AI feature conceptualization
  • Enterprise product management and requirements rigor
  • Client-facing communication and consulting maturity
  • Hands-on prototyping, experimentation, and validation
  • Cross-functional collaboration with engineering, UX, and delivery
  • Strong execution discipline and attention to detail
  • Commercial awareness and account growth mindset

Who Will Thrive Here

  • You are likely to thrive in this role if you are someone who enjoys building in fast-moving environments, likes solving messy enterprise problems, and can move comfortably between strategy and execution. You are structured but not rigid, hands-on but not narrow, and client-focused without losing product depth. You bring ownership, curiosity, and pragmatism. You know how to earn trust in a room, ask the right questions, and turn ambiguity into action
  • You should also enjoy working at the frontier of enterprise AI, where the best solutions require not only product thinking and technical awareness, but also judgment, experimentation, and strong partnership with clients and delivery teams

Why Join Accellor

This is an opportunity to play a meaningful role in shaping real enterprise AI products, not just internal experiments or slideware. At Accellor, you will work on cutting-edge AI applications for global clients, solve complex business problems, and build products that matter in real operating environments.

  • You will gain exposure to international clients, cross-functional teams, and high-impact business contexts. You will have the opportunity to influence both product direction and delivery outcomes, while building deep experience in one of the most important technology shifts underway today
  • For the right candidate, this role offers a strong platform for growth across AI product management, enterprise transformation, consulting, and global client leadership

Location / Working Model

This role is based in Hyderabad or Bangalore. Travel may be required based on client and project needs.

Reporting Structure

This role reports to the Head of Global Delivery and will work closely with leadership across Product, Engineering, Design, Delivery, and Client Engagement.

Benefits

Exciting Projects: We focus on industries like High-Tech, communication, media, healthcare, retail and telecom. Our customer list is full of fantastic global brands and leaders who love what we build for them.

Collaborative Environment: You Can expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open, laidback environment — or even abroad in one of our global centers.

Work-Life Balance: Accellor prioritizes work-life balance, which is why we offer flexible work schedules, opportunities to work from home, and paid time off and holidays.

Professional Development: Our dedicated Learning & Development team regularly organizes Communication skills training, Stress Management program, professional certifications, and technical and soft skill trainings.

Excellent Benefits: We provide our employees with competitive salaries, family medical insurance, Personal Accident Insurance, Periodic health awareness program, extended maternity leave, annual performance bonuses, and referral bonus

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Do you want to shape the future of fintech and healthtech? Energized by challenges and inspired by bold goals? Ready to elevate your career alongside driven and talented colleagues? If that sounds like you, explore a career at Alegeus today. Opportunity Happens Here.ResponsibilitiesAlegeus is modernizing into an API first, open integration platform that powers partners, employers, and participants across consumer- directed- healthcare. You will own the Integrations product surface so that partners can integrate faster with higher reliability, enabling new experiences and AI/agentic workflows. IntegrationOwnership ScopeYou will own all external integration modalities at Alegeus, including:Data integrations: Public APIs, webhooks, event streams, real-time interfaces, and asynchronous messaging patterns File-based integrations: EDI, CSV, batch processing, and secure file transfer (e.g., SFTP) Experience integrations: front-end microservices, embeddable widgets, and partner-facing UI extensionsThis role ensures that the above is designed, delivered, and evolved as one cohesive platform, not disconnected channels, with shared standards for security, versioning, observability, reliability, and partner experience.Outcomes you’ll ownReduce partner timetofirstvalue and increase adoption across key use cases. Ship a coherent v2 API set with clear versioning, deprecation, and a reliable release cadence. Launch a webhook/event framework (subscribe, replay, DLQ, idempotency) with partnergrade SLAs. Key ResponsibilitiesOwn the roadmap for Data, File and Experience integrations; define problem statements, success metrics, and crisp PRDs. Partner with design/engineering/Product owners to deliver secure, scalable interfaces and reference implementations. Work directly with marquee partners to map JTBD and translate into stable contracts/schemas. Drive packaging, auth models (OAuth/OIDC), rate limits, quotas, SLAs, and change management. Orchestrate launches: docs, changelogs, guides, enablement, and internal readiness. Required Qualifications6–10+ years in PM with SaaS integrations as your product (not just “has APIs”). Handson track record shipping public REST APIs & webhooks at scale; familiarity with async patterns, retries, backoff, and event semantics. Strong grasp of DX: information architecture for docs, quickstarts, SDK stewardship, error design. Data exchange expertise: realtime + bulk, schema evolution, validation, and observability for integrations. Excellent partnerfacing skills: discovery, solutioning, negotiating tradeoffs, clear communication. Nice to haveHealthcare, claims/eligibility, fintech/payments, or benefits ecosystem experience. API monetization/packaging, partner marketplaces, or appecosystem playbooks. Observability for integrations (schema drift detection, tracing, deadlettering, replay tools). How We’ll Measure SuccessAdoption of v2 endpoints & webhook subscriptions; reduction in partner integration time. Reliability (SLO attainment), latency improvements, and error rate reductions for integration flows. Partner and developer satisfaction (NPS/CSAT), documentation usability scores, and support ticket deflection. Because We Care, We OfferA flexible work environment Competitive salaries, paid vacation, and holidays Robust professional development programs Comprehensive health, wellness, and financial packages SHARED AMBITION. The information collected by this application is solely to determine suitability for employment, verify identity and maintain employment statistics on applicants. At Alegeus, being transparent about our compensation philosophy and approach is more than just a legal requirement. As our organization continues to grow and evolve, we have made a commitment to ensure that our compensation framework is equitable, data-driven, consistent, and unbiased, with allowable pay differences based on factors unique to each candidate (think: skills, experience, qualifications, etc.) in order to attract and retain a highly talented and committed workforce.We are taking an “inside-out” approach to pay transparency by first educating our valued managers and internal workforce and then moving to publishing compensation ranges externally. In the interim, if you are a California, Colorado, Connecticut, Maryland, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Ohio or Washington resident and this role is physically available in your state or classified as remote, you may be eligible to receive additional information about the compensation and benefits for this role, which we will provide upon request. Please send an email identifying the title of the role you are interested in and the state you reside in to talentacquisitionteam@alegeus.com.Alegeus may use AI technology during candidate interviews. The uses include recording, note-taking, and summarizing candidate interviews. The information generated by the AI technology will be used by Alegeus during the hiring process. If you wish to opt out of having AI technology transcribe your interview, please notify your recruiter in advance of the interview. Otherwise, by agreeing to an interview with us, you consent to the use of AI technology during your interview.
descriptionHtml:
Do you want to shape the future of fintech and healthtech? Energized by challenges and inspired by bold goals? Ready to elevate your career alongside driven and talented colleagues? If that sounds like you, explore a career at Alegeus today. Opportunity Happens Here.

Responsibilities

Alegeus is modernizing into an API first, open integration platform that powers partners, employers, and participants across consumer- directed- healthcare. You will own the Integrations product surface so that partners can integrate faster with higher reliability, enabling new experiences and AI/agentic workflows. Integration

Ownership Scope

You will own all external integration modalities at Alegeus, including:

  • Data integrations: Public APIs, webhooks, event streams, real-time interfaces, and asynchronous messaging patterns File-based integrations: EDI, CSV, batch processing, and secure file transfer (e.g., SFTP) Experience integrations: front-end microservices, embeddable widgets, and partner-facing UI extensions
  • This role ensures that the above is designed, delivered, and evolved as one cohesive platform, not disconnected channels, with shared standards for security, versioning, observability, reliability, and partner experience.


Outcomes you’ll own

  • Reduce partner timetofirstvalue and increase adoption across key use cases.
  • Ship a coherent v2 API set with clear versioning, deprecation, and a reliable release cadence.
  • Launch a webhook/event framework (subscribe, replay, DLQ, idempotency) with partnergrade SLAs.
  • Deliver a developer experience that delights: dev portal, docs, SDKs, samples, error taxonomy, sandbox, chatbot, etc.
  • Establish product analytics & KPIs (adoption, latency, reliability, errors, partner NPS) with dashboards.


Key Responsibilities

  • Own the roadmap for Data, File and Experience integrations; define problem statements, success metrics, and crisp PRDs.
  • Partner with design/engineering/Product owners to deliver secure, scalable interfaces and reference implementations.
  • Work directly with marquee partners to map JTBD and translate into stable contracts/schemas.
  • Drive packaging, auth models (OAuth/OIDC), rate limits, quotas, SLAs, and change management.
  • Orchestrate launches: docs, changelogs, guides, enablement, and internal readiness.


Required Qualifications

  • 6–10+ years in PM with SaaS integrations as your product (not just “has APIs”).
  • Handson track record shipping public REST APIs & webhooks at scale; familiarity with async patterns, retries, backoff, and event semantics.
  • Strong grasp of DX: information architecture for docs, quickstarts, SDK stewardship, error design.
  • Data exchange expertise: realtime + bulk, schema evolution, validation, and observability for integrations.
  • Excellent partnerfacing skills: discovery, solutioning, negotiating tradeoffs, clear communication.


Nice to have

  • Healthcare, claims/eligibility, fintech/payments, or benefits ecosystem experience.
  • API monetization/packaging, partner marketplaces, or appecosystem playbooks.
  • Observability for integrations (schema drift detection, tracing, deadlettering, replay tools).


How We’ll Measure Success

  • Adoption of v2 endpoints & webhook subscriptions; reduction in partner integration time.
  • Reliability (SLO attainment), latency improvements, and error rate reductions for integration flows.
  • Partner and developer satisfaction (NPS/CSAT), documentation usability scores, and support ticket deflection.


Because We Care, We Offer

  • A flexible work environment
  • Competitive salaries, paid vacation, and holidays
  • Robust professional development programs
  • Comprehensive health, wellness, and financial packages


SHARED AMBITION. INSPIRED FUTURE.

At Alegeus, our success is guided by our aligned vision and values—it is how we work together and collaborate to achieve our goals.

  • People First. We pride ourselves in bringing talented people together and treating one another with care.
  • Partner Powered. We are committed to empowering our partners, knowing our success is shared and we win as one.
  • Always Advancing. We are driven by potential and relentlessly determined to achieve our goals.


“I truly believe that people who are well-skilled and talented can go wherever they want in this company. We want to create the best place anyone has ever worked.” - Alegeus employee

Apply now, connect a friend to this opportunity, or sign up for job alerts!

We are committed to a policy of Equal Employment Opportunity and will not discriminate against an applicant or employee on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, national origin or ancestry, sex, age, physical or mental disability, veteran or military status, genetic information, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally recognized protected basis under federal, state or local laws, regulations or ordinances. The information collected by this application is solely to determine suitability for employment, verify identity and maintain employment statistics on applicants.

At Alegeus, being transparent about our compensation philosophy and approach is more than just a legal requirement. As our organization continues to grow and evolve, we have made a commitment to ensure that our compensation framework is equitable, data-driven, consistent, and unbiased, with allowable pay differences based on factors unique to each candidate (think: skills, experience, qualifications, etc.) in order to attract and retain a highly talented and committed workforce.

We are taking an “inside-out” approach to pay transparency by first educating our valued managers and internal workforce and then moving to publishing compensation ranges externally. In the interim, if you are a California, Colorado, Connecticut, Maryland, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, Ohio or Washington resident and this role is physically available in your state or classified as remote, you may be eligible to receive additional information about the compensation and benefits for this role, which we will provide upon request. Please send an email identifying the title of the role you are interested in and the state you reside in to talentacquisitionteam@alegeus.com.

Alegeus may use AI technology during candidate interviews. The uses include recording, note-taking, and summarizing candidate interviews. The information generated by the AI technology will be used by Alegeus during the hiring process. If you wish to opt out of having AI technology transcribe your interview, please notify your recruiter in advance of the interview. Otherwise, by agreeing to an interview with us, you consent to the use of AI technology during your interview.

descriptionHtml:
About Us

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.

At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.

Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

Job Description

Senior Product Manager – Post Purchase Data Integrations & AI

About The Role

The post purchase team at Visa is looking for a hands-on and strategic Product Manager / Product Builder to lead the development of our data integration platform and own our Dispute Management product which is part of our post purchase solutions. This role sits at the intersection of product strategy, data infrastructure, and AI-driven automation, and is critical to enabling scalable, reliable integrations across a diverse ecosystem of data sources. You will own high-impact product areas focused on post-purchase workflows, dispute lifecycle management, and integrations with external systems (issuers, acquirers, and partners). You will be able to work on both customers facing solutioning and articulate complex technical solutioning into simple and effective messaging.

You will define and execute the roadmap for how we ingest, normalize, and operationalize data—leveraging modern integration patterns and AI to improve speed, resilience, and intelligence.

This role requires someone who can think at the system level while also diving deep into execution details.

What You’ll Do

Product Strategy & Ownership:

  • Define the vision and roadmap for data integrations across multiple internal and external data sources (APIs, PSPs, third-party platforms, etc.)
  • Identify opportunities to leverage AI/ML to automate integration workflows, schema mapping, anomaly detection, and data quality improvements
  • Balance long-term platform investments with near-term customer and business needs

Execution & Delivery

  • Work closely with engineering to design and deliver scalable, resilient integration frameworks
  • Drive end-to-end product development—from discovery and requirements to launch and iteration
  • Define integration standards, contracts, and best practices (e.g., versioning, schema evolution, monitoring)

AI-Driven Innovation

  • Partner with data science / engineering to apply AI for:
    • Intelligent data mapping and transformation
    • Automated onboarding of new data sources
    • Error detection and self-healing pipelines
  • Bring a pragmatic approach to AI—focusing on real business impact, not hype
  • Experience in a product builder role with hands on Claude coding will be a huge plus.
Cross-Functional Leadership

  • Collaborate with distributed teams across engineering, data, operations, and go-to-market
  • Communicate complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • Act as the connective tissue between product, engineering, and business teams

Data & Metrics

  • Define success metrics for integrations (latency, reliability, coverage, cost, etc.)
  • Use data to prioritize roadmap decisions and continuously improve system performance
  • Build dashboards and insights to monitor integration health and usage

Why This Role Matters

You’ll be building the foundation that enables the business to scale—turning fragmented data into a cohesive, intelligent system. Your work will directly impact speed of integration, quality of insights, and ability to innovate using AI.

This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.

Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.

Qualifications

What We’re Looking For:

Core Product Skills

10+ years of product management experience, ideally in platform, data, or API-driven products

Proven ability to operate both strategically and hands-on in complex technical domains

Strong product instincts with a bias toward action and ownership

Technical & Integration Expertise

Deep understanding of data integrations, APIs, ETL/ELT pipelines, and distributed systems

Experience working with integration tools or frameworks (e.g., middleware, iPaaS, event-driven systems)

Familiarity with data formats and protocols (REST, webhooks, batch processing, streaming, etc.)

AI & Data Orientation

Experience or strong interest in applying AI/ML to product problems, especially in data-heavy environments

Ability to identify where AI meaningfully improves integration efficiency or quality

Execution & Agency

Highly proactive, high-agency operator who takes ownership and drives outcomes

Comfortable navigating ambiguity and building from 0→1 as well as scaling existing systems

Strong problem-solving skills with attention to detail

Communication & Collaboration

Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Experience working with distributed/global teams

Ability to influence without authority and align stakeholders across functions

Nice To Have

  • Experience in payments, fintech, or dispute management ecosystems
  • Familiarity with tools like Kafka, Snowflake, dbt, or similar
  • Background working with third-party integrations at scale (PSPs, marketplaces, SaaS platforms)
  • Domain experience in Dispute Management, Payments & working with merchants and banks
  • A background in Computer Science & Engineering is a huge plus
  • Product Sense and experience in enterprise products
  • Systems Integration experience & Understanding of third-party integrations
  • Experience with Claude Code & AI based agents is a huge plus
  • Fintech experience in payments and/ or dispute management is a plus
  • Experience in Acquiring Banks preferred but not a must have

Visa is an EEO Employer

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.
